Peter,
---
Tucker Carlson revealed a poll that shows a MAJORITY of Americans believe Joe Biden is NOT in charge of the White House.
---
_Instead, it 's Kamala who is truly running America._
---
That's why we need to deal a massive blow to Kamala's power by ending her Senate majority next year.
---
That begins by winning this OPEN SENATE seat in Missouri.

name: me, DeSantis, Scalise (3)
subject: FWD: This is BY FAR the most important email you'll read this year. 📨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Here's your chance to make an essential difference for the future of America.
Are you there, Peter? I'm sorry to drop into your inbox again but I really need you to see these messages from Republican Whip Steve Scalise and Governor Ron DeSantis. [**Could you please take a look, then respond as soon as you can?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57964041:JEQzwzl4N:m:1:3253819041:305148F1B0E29EA54E511781F6D5E54A:r)
_\---------- Forwarded Message ----------_
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57964041:JEQzwzl4N:m:1:3253819041:305148F1B0E29EA54E511781F6D5E54A:r)
From: **Steve Scalise**
Subject: This is BY FAR the most important email you'll read this year.

Hello, Steve Scalise following up for Ron DeSantis.
**This is BY FAR the most important email you'll read this year.**
President Trump made it crystal clear that he needs ALL Conservatives -- including me, you, and Ron -- to do our part to defend our America first movement.
[**Ron asked for your help. Now I'm asking for it too. Here's your chance to make an essential difference for the future of America.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57964041:JEQzwzl4N:m:1:3253819041:305148F1B0E29EA54E511781F6D5E54A:r)
If $25 or $50 is too much, I completely understand. Every little bit helps when the stakes are this high. Even just $5 or $10 can make a world of difference.
Please send in support before it's too late. We really need you.
_\-- Steve Scalise (Republican Whip)_
_\---------- Forwarded Message ----------_
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57964041:JEQzwzl4N:m:1:3253819041:305148F1B0E29EA54E511781F6D5E54A:r)
From: **Ron DeSantis**
Subject: You know me. I'm not one to mince words.

Hey Peter, it's Governor Ron DeSantis. You know me -- I'm not one to mince words.
**Neither is President Trump.**
That's why I proudly supported him when he just made this bold statement: _" The survival of America depends upon our ability to elect Republicans at every level."_
The Liberal Media, the Radical Socialists in Congress, and Joe Biden's cronies are plowing ahead to fundamentally change everything that makes America great.
[**I 'm asking for you to help Republicans right now!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57964042:JEQzwzl4N:m:1:3253819041:305148F1B0E29EA54E511781F6D5E54A:r)
Our country is at a crossroad.
We either let the Democrats turn America into a Socialist country and tear President Trump's legacy apart...
**OR we come together and prove that our America first movement is worth fighting for!**
[**If every Patriot chips in a few bucks, we will have the resources to elect Republicans up and down the ballot!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57964041:JEQzwzl4N:m:1:3253819041:305148F1B0E29EA54E511781F6D5E54A:r)
_This won't be easy -- we need your help._
...And you don't strike me as someone who gives up when the going gets tough.
**That 's why I'm coming directly to you, Peter. Are you in?**
For America,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57964041:JEQzwzl4N:m:1:3253819041:305148F1B0E29EA54E511781F6D5E54A:r)
Ron DeSantis
Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003

I'm not one to mince words. Hey Peter, it's Governor Ron DeSantis. You know me -- I'm not one to mince words. Neither is President Trump. That's why I proudly supported him when he just made this bold statement: " The survival of America depends upon our ability to elect Republicans at every level." The Liberal Media, the Radical Socialists in Congress, and Joe Biden's cronies are plowing ahead to fundamentally change everything that makes America great. Our country is at a crossroad. We either let the Democrats turn America into a Socialist country and tear President Trump's legacy apart... OR we come together and prove that our America first movement is worth fighting for! This won't be easy -- we need your help. ...And you don't strike me as someone who gives up when the going gets tough. That 's why I'm coming directly to you, Peter. Are you in? For America, Ron DeSantis Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: Greater Georgia
subject: FIVE QUESTIONS FOR U.S. SENATE RULES LIBERALS AHEAD OF MONDAY'S FIELD HEARING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, JULY 19, 2021
FIVE QUESTIONS FOR U.S. SENATE RULES LIBERALS AHEAD OF MONDAY'S FIELD HEARING
ATLANTA - Today, July 19, the U.S. Senate Rules Committee will hold a [field hearing](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HFEPoni6hwsVxa0FIF3nFTJO1drBeFpqDNRiqMox55FeG_uo7n-ee6k8vXhRL-28HHaOuwfsgjR36Y7ZehBdRTSFXolmvztha0SBcbmy5Eb8wT52q8y7Ed59Bx9YPqE-9T7v0PYFPFL7AKWasQrpAOzFz8Rhn8D9v21PYE-69ZMGY2oNFsBi0kzLRnQn3phIJY-3vVN4sFS8AEwtU_GSuQNTRkdoNVwSb1qNyBAtFZcyZmVIQBttdEU13NZqJEeJfV5AipNfR3RWVI0rZlQDBZCwsvRAkFRlUzIJhvnG0oLaTjS0wzAN-4JHuU-7jg926mfSHJ0ElTaQx9_V1bLSa1Dy4uQOhn1e57j3jUVpa5bvuM5FBbaTfrqXE7KTj62tUZN_OZUm5JMtArW66PKrAg==&c=-CX1SaYHn6Y-IMxCEY553GWSYYyWyKi2hAQsKwXzyNET9KNI-Y5OBQ==&ch=ap0jLTE33dKoYnK7n5aUrEJKU_ayjcR-rc4EW4mQ4GyqVxgda_m3ww==) - its first in 20 years - in Georgia to [criticize](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HFEPoni6hwsVxa0FIF3nFTJO1drBeFpqDNRiqMox55FeG_uo7n-ee6k8vXhRL-28Ay0VUQIlOZDzGdbddX9KZ6iWLhgia-X96Dt4q2DIFLzrPIzIsYBUxb5KZREf5_bbMJoZkwYaiCOfrl7N8HP61UK7sbE0jeKlbDCJzzYhRTuMzL73qyCFneQ4Tp5zoZeTXogi8XUHYRs1dtCuGCNLAFmkxNfTR-QhJkwhxaDY5z3RKLopu3Uoq5oBTZPAEVq6CCp2WqLWUsI=&c=-CX1SaYHn6Y-IMxCEY553GWSYYyWyKi2hAQsKwXzyNET9KNI-Y5OBQ==&ch=ap0jLTE33dKoYnK7n5aUrEJKU_ayjcR-rc4EW4mQ4GyqVxgda_m3ww==) the Election Integrity Act (S.B. 202), which expands access and secures elections in our state, and to renew calls for an unconstitutional federal takeover of elections.
Ahead of the political theater, here are five questions Georgians deserve to have answered at Monday's hearing:
1.) Will the Senate Rules Committee hold field hearings in blue states, such as New York, Connecticut, and Delaware, which offer [less ballot access](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HFEPoni6hwsVxa0FIF3nFTJO1drBeFpqDNRiqMox55FeG_uo7n-ee6k8vXhRL-287LlrK1pbLG3Ik6F9pMOkySF4LbXHnMxyyaRkJkgJaxZoC3N2qqlPnH_clxr7DeWZ-IwPWG77SBl5-KRD4WMPBHpacCo8xgnYtX78jVJFCCVOTCA8KJ4ydTr4VLpMzOwsB5SK9Ev9Rg9KGLaStRno1Q==&c=-CX1SaYHn6Y-IMxCEY553GWSYYyWyKi2hAQsKwXzyNET9KNI-Y5OBQ==&ch=ap0jLTE33dKoYnK7n5aUrEJKU_ayjcR-rc4EW4mQ4GyqVxgda_m3ww==) and more restrictive absentee voting requirements?
2.) Why is the Biden-Harris Administration politicizing the Department of Justice in an attempt to overturn a state law that [expands](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HFEPoni6hwsVxa0FIF3nFTJO1drBeFpqDNRiqMox55FeG_uo7n-ee9_S0JXtrYaamwhT5PVduM0gInBDoBTV3wNwNw8OFsYh8IaLSrIvG-G-IW1XMfZq9_F0xDCj-Vf9mrKjZmsTKm0EMgtSRChukzr38FmPJA-hOGmPxqzuPLF5_MTFqfWvEjOgV-j4UahT2W-l0Tc4OKc7spj2ja8qW0aJyQB3abL0n1z6be8HnP11JYoxP5EdbQ==&c=-CX1SaYHn6Y-IMxCEY553GWSYYyWyKi2hAQsKwXzyNET9KNI-Y5OBQ==&ch=ap0jLTE33dKoYnK7n5aUrEJKU_ayjcR-rc4EW4mQ4GyqVxgda_m3ww==) voting access?
3.) Why did Stacey Abrams, Raphael Warnock, [Joe Biden](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HFEPoni6hwsVxa0FIF3nFTJO1drBeFpqDNRiqMox55FeG_uo7n-ee1f9QdTsdh-tjLj492BuhFYeAZw2FEp7l-uA8jCSkrhjNaarKNqpRjWREpNhNsMqYE328EN2f4crrE01gEqICNwL7o8_LjmjdtH6PHqpK8lbsGWdrJpGUd1dw94Ys-IZhotCfKtsk7q7iCHVO3Ubcig=&c=-CX1SaYHn6Y-IMxCEY553GWSYYyWyKi2hAQsKwXzyNET9KNI-Y5OBQ==&ch=ap0jLTE33dKoYnK7n5aUrEJKU_ayjcR-rc4EW4mQ4GyqVxgda_m3ww==), and other liberals knowingly [spread false information](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HFEPoni6hwsVxa0FIF3nFTJO1drBeFpqDNRiqMox55FeG_uo7n-eezq_vW3wrpIeHbppBum4sco5ivqXdlV_Kx5G128_zCEuVUl5nIG5U_CmueQgqqDV2UytAccouamNrlA-D7UbGYYKRkUsENxO8vcige1bZgCrjByBM4BnO0Ne9Zf_Xu9Uz9T2BwKemYKgX2qEgxbaJQ_coJ7x01xPGH6ViJ0s9PivI3s5tXXHB00=&c=-CX1SaYHn6Y-IMxCEY553GWSYYyWyKi2hAQsKwXzyNET9KNI-Y5OBQ==&ch=ap0jLTE33dKoYnK7n5aUrEJKU_ayjcR-rc4EW4mQ4GyqVxgda_m3ww==) about S.B. 202 and [attempt to hide](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HFEPoni6hwsVxa0FIF3nFTJO1drBeFpqDNRiqMox55FeG_uo7n-ee6k8vXhRL-28G1n55Exkw1z5gCrbk5Ozk62SnLp1PC-Rf-Z5yAPj76auOSNAtsLpL4Z-TofrGwhyJPoZBGpM5AR4cmKcZC08GeWxAIa_igsYhYcVsMaElXbo_MzFIMEwiBxnFiVh-gEKiMFZuljGLut3OmvHfCjggqPfoUV39MlNDeriqyLzHhKJ_kk4DVMEfDHraxC_wETCw-Qt8jjsyr7UoETM4DgHp6ZkERPlaw6h&c=-CX1SaYHn6Y-IMxCEY553GWSYYyWyKi2hAQsKwXzyNET9KNI-Y5OBQ==&ch=ap0jLTE33dKoYnK7n5aUrEJKU_ayjcR-rc4EW4mQ4GyqVxgda_m3ww==) their support for boycotts, costing Georgia a [$100-million](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HFEPoni6hwsVxa0FIF3nFTJO1drBeFpqDNRiqMox55FeG_uo7n-ee0wUcyYjlANpcZ7kKSKUJsUmzs9nLOzpjwksrzgA72pFBpYrw-Y_AU2XwAqKiLKDO392Q3lFr0BxpRXvfT1paV3gEYHvxRUrTxDe6yJ13wmjSuEjcsJMBWMnUjBbpC2GOfArJHPFSb-XDh97IiItYfBZe_u5UGQ8kpW8M_U8Sf3c9vURiNIn4Iw=&c=-CX1SaYHn6Y-IMxCEY553GWSYYyWyKi2hAQsKwXzyNET9KNI-Y5OBQ==&ch=ap0jLTE33dKoYnK7n5aUrEJKU_ayjcR-rc4EW4mQ4GyqVxgda_m3ww==) opportunity?
4.) With the Left's [unconstitutional](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HFEPoni6hwsVxa0FIF3nFTJO1drBeFpqDNRiqMox55FeG_uo7n-ee6k8vXhRL-28TPjrzLyz1fy_trmp51co-ixMEo5JpvzxUzfHVxJjFSdo5_uPbUDnDiXFjWYPdTNzVaxbTmlTIaQkAmU8z3K2BS6B2fP3EyI3nqOCJGAg6gZNTMWQpiT8W2dnYrGArM5jzZcNIa-Alidj_MhvBa5qe9ZbG8Us8KpCTgkN7ujXY3LEpdumqlO5-w==&c=-CX1SaYHn6Y-IMxCEY553GWSYYyWyKi2hAQsKwXzyNET9KNI-Y5OBQ==&ch=ap0jLTE33dKoYnK7n5aUrEJKU_ayjcR-rc4EW4mQ4GyqVxgda_m3ww==) power-grab to federalize state elections (S.1) [defeated](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HFEPoni6hwsVxa0FIF3nFTJO1drBeFpqDNRiqMox55FeG_uo7n-ee6k8vXhRL-28VI5gCGmEHuPOb5Jp4qbHXSs6fV4cgDYejfyXNZrK7yLjNMAHh5lqsoZ9MNQeROI6dEZ9HvR3nKKP_QNMNa2Kn_jfx5kO8OmgXF_84AZVKxjnjqpP-A_vWaMtuLMDG5hUxiYxGXzD3i-712vAAS2XDJtVCm2h1vJmkiWeqy3c3HNyT4EYrrHj1c3YtjmViHZ7gHcn3qBA99xfeuPIW4h-TA==&c=-CX1SaYHn6Y-IMxCEY553GWSYYyWyKi2hAQsKwXzyNET9KNI-Y5OBQ==&ch=ap0jLTE33dKoYnK7n5aUrEJKU_ayjcR-rc4EW4mQ4GyqVxgda_m3ww==) in the Senate, and the U.S. Supreme Court upholding Arizona's voting laws, have members considered the role their push to weaken election safeguards plays in reducing confidence in election outcomes?
5.) Have all of the members of the U.S. Senate Rules Committee read Georgia's S.B. 202?
---

Friend,

**Running for governor of Florida is a big undertaking** , especially when your opponent has the support of wealthy special interest donors who want to see him run for president.

But while Gov. Ron DeSantis may have big money from out of state, Charlie's counting on something even more special to help him win this race: **the grassroots support of everyday Floridians** from the Panhandle all the way to the Keys.

And Charlie knows he can't take your support for granted. That's why we're reaching out to some of his top supporters with our new **Florida Issues Survey!** It won't take long to complete, and it asks your opinion on a variety of issues affecting the Sunshine State right now.

Your response will be incredibly helpful as we work to shape our strategy for this election, friend. **[Please take a few minutes to complete the survey and let us know your thoughts on the issues at stake in the governor's race!](https://act.myngp.com/el/Lcodt3SR2zzuAwxRDFahFw==/7qVw2og0Ow-vuVc4KNQOnQ==)**

Crist for Governor

If we don't stop them from abusing their power in the largest county in the nation, other counties will follow quickly. This is their first step, we must stop them NOW. Thank you, Ric Grenell Fix California Inc. | 800 W. name: Tina Ramirez
subject: A Mother and a Businesswoman
body:
Not a Politician.

Peter,

It has been my life goal to help people find freedom around the
world.

>From being raised by Air Force veterans, becoming a high-school
teacher, starting the Congressional International Religious
Freedom Caucus, to founding Hardwired Global, and now my current
mission.

My passion for service, freedom, and work with people worldwide
has led me here.

I AM RUNNING FOR VIRGINIA'S 7TH
CONGRESSIONAL SEAT

As a single mother and business
owner, I know what hard work looks like. And here's what WE will
be working towards:

Protecting the Sanctity of Life
Ensuring our Religious Freedom
Opposing "Cancel Culture"
Stopping Critical Race Theory and Promoting School Choice
Reforming the System for our Veterans
Defending the Second Amendment
Securing our Election

CONTRIBUTE TOWARDS THE RAMIREZ
CAMPAIGN

This will be an uphill battle, but I
know that together we can win this! No longer can we stand by as
Spanberger continues to hurt the people of Virginia's 7th
congressional district.

Let's win this together,

Tina Ramirez
Republican Candidate
Virginia's 7th Congressional District

CONTRIBUTE TOWARDS THE RAMIREZ
CAMPAIGN

Copyright © 2021 Tina Ramirez for
Congress, Inc., All rights reserved.

P.O. Box 73444 Chesterfield, VA 23235

name: Heidi St. John
subject: *Reminder* My Ride-Along With the Vancouver Police Department
body:
I respect the men and women who work to keep us safe.
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---|---
|
Hi Friends!

Last Wednesday, I was invited to participate in a ride-along with the Vancouver Police Department. Jeff Anaya has worked as a Law Enforcement Officer (LEO) for twelve years--two where he was trained in Oakland California, and ten here in Vancouver.

I respect the men and women who work to keep us safe. Imagine not knowing whether the day holds a high-speed collision or a close encounter with a loaded weapon. That's what our law enforcement officers deal with when they put on the uniform, and it's why they put in the time, training, and effort that it takes to prepare for the unexpected.

As we drove, I asked Jeff why in the world he would put his life on the line for the citizens of Vancouver. He explained how much he loves his job and described the unique skill set that's necessary to do it--but in all honesty, he didn't need to verbalize his answer. It was clear throughout the evening that he has a deep commitment to the safety of the city and community he works for. He and his wife love where they live, and, like most LEO's, they want their community to thrive.

After all, they are raising their young children here, too.

Before we left the station, a man who appeared to be wearing a hospital ID bracelet approached the vehicle. Jeff engaged the man for about ten minutes, respectfully answering his questions and offering assistance.

It wasn't what the media wants us to see: a white police officer helping a black man. Kindness and respect went both directions. It doesn't fit what most of us are being told right now and yet, that's what I saw.

The timing of my ride along was interesting, because just the day before, I was in Vancouver speaking to a group of voters about my run for Congress. Afterward, a couple approached me and asked, "If you ever get to talk to the police, please ask them why they are not doing their job." They were angry. A "homeless camp" has been set up in their neighborhood.

The citizens of this area have every reason to be frustrated. Tents are being erected by the dozens in neighborhoods and near businesses all over Vancouver. The police have been told that they are not to interfere. Instead, the city is paying for portable toilets and thereby, they encourage these tent cities to grow larger, and more dangerous.

Can you imagine if your house was the location where people with drug addiction and mental illness decided to set up camp?

Could you sell your house for what it was worth? Could you afford move without selling your home? Would you feel safe while drug deals and prostitution were happening on your street and in front of your home? And yet, that's what our citizens are dealing with.

There are dozens of organizations who are dedicated to helping the homeless and drug addicted. There are state and private organizations committed to assisting the mentally ill--but the state and local leadership has decided that these camps are a fine alternative. And so, with no incentive to get clean or get help, the camps grow.

Is this what we want as a community? Somehow, I don't think so.

Officer Anaya pulled a man over who he clocked at 77mph heading westbound on Mill Plain. There was a FELONY WARRANT out for his arrest, but thanks to legislators and bureaucrats in our city, Jeff could do nothing except to issue yet another ticket that will likely never be paid. The man drove away.

And so it went. Over and over, I watched Officer Anaya engage stressful situations with compassion and confidence. It was truly an honor to watch him do his job--and it was frustrating, too. At least twice, he would have opted to take an offender to jail for the safety of Vancouver citizens--but the law prevented him from doing so.

The police can't do their job to keep you safe if the the city officials and State legislators tie their hands. And that's what's happening. Like the WA legislature, Vancouver's gone "woke," and soon, the evidence will be everywhere. Something tells me we will not like the results of such poor leadership.

Is your voice being heard?

Elections have consequences. Every citizen in CD-03 needs to know exactly who is on their City Council. We need to call these people and start asking questions. It's time to engage with our Mayors and our city management. We need to know how judges feel about supporting law enforcement officers and see who is willing to prosecute people who willfully break the law in our beautiful district.

Every community needs leaders--people that our kids and grandkids can look up to. Law enforcement officers across CD-03 put their lives on the line every day to protect and serve the people of our area. They need our support.

Public safety is public service, and that's what police work is all about.

I'm committed to supporting our LEO's in whatever way that I can. We need to stand together and change the narrative that's being pushed about LEO's.

The time is now.
|
---
| | |
---
| A Special Thank You to Our Donors!
Our second quarter fundraising efforts proved successful. We surpassed our goal and made a significant statement to the District. I could not have done this without you and for that I am eternally thankful. This is not just my fight. This is everyone's fight and every donation brings us closer to our goal of reclaiming our nation, our state and our community from those who seek to destroy all we hold dear.
---

---
| | |
---|---
|

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: No rest for the weary
body:
Peter,

I hope this note finds you well and enjoying the warm weather wherever you are!

Reflecting on the last few months, it’s been quite a blur on my end.

At Coro, I’ve been inspired by all that I’ve witnessed so far during my tenure as Executive Director. It started with our first ever leadership conference in April, which was an incredible gathering of thought leaders, policymakers, newsmakers, and most importantly our Coro community.

Last month, I had the opportunity to provide testimony to New York Advisory Committee to the U.S. Commission on Civil Rights on racial discrimination in evictions in New York.

Last week, I wrote an op-ed in the Daily News encouraging the recent winners of NYC’s municipal primaries to start preparing to govern now.

There is certainly no rest for the weary!

In the days, weeks, and months ahead, I’ll be filling you in on the work I’ll be doing to continue to support our community, Coro, and beyond.

With gratitude,

Adem

Brooklyn NY 11213-0427 United States

name: Nikki Fried
subject: I want to make this completely clear
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

Last week, tens of thousands of Cubans took to the streets in the largest demonstration against the Cuban government since the 1990s.

For decades, the Cuban people have been denied their basic human rights and freedoms. They’ve been pushed down and left behind by the oppressive communist regime. And now, with COVID-19 taking a deadly toll on the Cuban people and hunger ravaging the island, they’ve taken to the streets to demand freedom from the tyranny of their government.

As Florida’s only statewide elected Democrat, I want to make this completely clear: Florida Democrats stand in solidarity with the Cuban people and against the communist regime that has oppressed them for decades.

We’re already seeing the Cuban government begin a violent crackdown on protests, and I strongly condemn their actions. These protestors are demanding a better future for themselves and for future generations, and they deserve to have their voices heard.

Communist repression has plagued the Cuban people for far too long. But, seeing the strength and the courage of these protestors gives me hope. With continued support and solidarity from communities like ours, Cuba could very well enter into a new era of freedom and prosperity.

I will continue to do all I can to support their efforts, and I hope you’ll stand with me in solidarity with the brave protesters in Cuba, in Florida, and across the world.

Patria y Vida.

With gratitude,
Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Walt Blackman
subject: they’re openly indoctrinating our children
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walt Blackman for Congress |
body:
| |
---
|
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57967953:JtaEWzlNM:m:1:3253819041:66A1265E7F3F77DB5F2036828A33148F:r)
|
---
Hi Peter, I'm Walt Blackman, I'm a Combat Veteran, a Conservative Patriot, and I'm running for Congress in Arizona's 1st Congressional District.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57967953:JtaEWzlNM:m:1:3253819041:66A1265E7F3F77DB5F2036828A33148F:r)

I'm bringing this story from _the Daily Wire_ to the attention of every conservative and patriotic American.

⬇⬇⬇
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57967953:JtaEWzlNM:m:1:3253819041:66A1265E7F3F77DB5F2036828A33148F:r)
This is very disturbing news, Peter. Teacher unions are holding our schools, teachers, and children hostage with this dangerous ideology.

If you're not sure what Critical Race Theory is and why is it so bad for America's children, I'll do a quick rundown:

**-> It teaches only the bad in American history, never the good. **
**-> It tries to sow division of Americans by race, just as Marxism divided by class. **
**-> It indoctrinates our children with anti-American propaganda. **
[**Defeat Critical Race Theory: Rush A Donation Now**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57967953:JtaEWzlNM:m:1:3253819041:66A1265E7F3F77DB5F2036828A33148F:r)
Critical Race Theory is a way for the radical Left to brainwash our children and fill their heads with their radical agenda. _**Plain and simple.**_

**[If you agree, then rush $5 right now toward my effort to Defeat Critical Race Theory >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57967954:JtaEWzlNM:m:1:3253819041:66A1265E7F3F77DB5F2036828A33148F:r)**
[**Defeat Critical Race Theory: Rush A Donation Now**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57967953:JtaEWzlNM:m:1:3253819041:66A1265E7F3F77DB5F2036828A33148F:r)
_Want to hear the rest of my story? _

I served in the United States Army for nearly 22 years as a Front Line Tank Commander. I completed 7 tours of duty in some of the world's most dangerous battlefields, including Kosovo, Afghanistan, and Iraq, where I fought in the Second Battle of Fallujah, the bloodiest battle in the Iraq War.

My service earned me a Bronze Star for combat action in Iraq and a Meritorious Service Medal. But the most important thing I learned from my service was _**the true price of Freedom and how fragile it is.**_

You know Freedom means something a little different to veterans, warfighters, and combat vets.

We look at it a bit differently. When we see that flag, something burns deep inside--that burning we have is for a desire to preserve Freedom for everyone regardless of background.

_**We believe in Freedom.**_

**We don 't believe in burning down monuments...**

**We don 't believe in burning our flag... **

**We stand up for our flag!**

**And we stand up for the United States of America!**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57967953:JtaEWzlNM:m:1:3253819041:66A1265E7F3F77DB5F2036828A33148F:r)

I'm running for Congress because I know the true price of Freedom, and I know what's at stake if we lose it.

**I 've served my country faithfully for 22 years; I hope you help me continue that service in Congress! **

**If you want to join me in my fight for Freedom, you can chip in at this secure link:****[https://secure.winred.com/walt-blackman-for-congress/action-2600500](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57967953:JtaEWzlNM:m:1:3253819041:66A1265E7F3F77DB5F2036828A33148F:r)**

Thank you,
Walt Blackman
|

#

Our first finance report is officially public, team. So we wanted to break down some of the numbers for you:
* During the first quarter, we raised a total of **$752,108,** nearly _three times_ more than the amount we raised in the same period in 2018.

* A total of **6,846 individual donors** contributed to our movement, nearly _seven times_ the number of folks who donated in the same time period to our 2018 campaign.

* A majority of our supporters donated _$100 or less_ — nearly **92 percent** of donations came from small donors.

* **Educators and teachers** are the most common contributors to Mike’s campaign, and _99 percent_ of our donations come from right here in Texas.

Thanks to supporters like you powering our movement, our message is resonating with folks all across the state and signals the momentum we have on our side. We couldn't be prouder of the fact that our movement is built by everyday Texans chipping in here and there — not corporate PACs and lobbyists. **The success of our movement relies on grassroots supporters across Texas who are ready for honest leadership. name: Freedom Caucus
subject: GOP Primary Election Nearing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c216%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=67P2u3h%2fMKyrwKDofZzQ9w&sysid=1)
Fellow Conservative: House Freedom Fund has one mission: to help elect strong, tough, principled conservatives to the U.S. House of Representatives. In Texas’s 6th congressional district, we’ve found one.

**Susan Wright** (R-TX) is exactly the kind of leader we need in the House to fight liberals in both parties. Susan has HFF’s full endorsement and support, and I hope she can count on yours too.

[**Join House Freedom Fund in supporting Susan today!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4113%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mIk8u%2f9uPHxWIt3hhxfstQ&sysid=1)

Susan is the widow of former House Freedom Caucus member Ron Wright, a great friend and a tireless champion for traditional American values. His death in February was a shock. But his legacy of service and commitment to making America great again is at the heart of Susan’s campaign to replace him.

▶︎ Susan is a pro-life, pro-gun, pro-wall conservative ready to take on The Swamp.

▶︎ She has served Texas for three decades - working in the state legislature, advising local communities on transportation and economic issues, and fighting the Left at her husband’s side.

▶︎ She has publicly pledged to join the House Freedom Caucus.

▶︎ She has been endorsed by President Donald Trump.

[**Susan is ready to fight for us. Please help us fight for her!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4114%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4bvEIYh9jRFDJSivkxPyQA&sysid=1)

Susan finished first in the primary election, ahead of 22 other candidates. Now she is in the runoff up against a classic RINO who favors amnesty and opposes school choice.

Never-Trump Republicans are funding Susan’s opponent, who is trying to win the July 27th runoff election with Democrat crossover votes.

**Conservatives must answer this challenge.**

President Trump supports Susan. So do grassroots conservatives in Texas and around the country. This election is HFF’s top election priority for this summer. We have to send a message to the Never-Trump RINOs that they’re not in charge anymore.

[**Please give Susan your support today!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4125%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YoXml%2bbTXbFzdWHNDFUuvw&sysid=1)

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to support conservative leadership in Washington. Sincerely, Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund | |
---
**COUNTDOWN TO JULY 27TH
RUNOFF ELECTION**
|
---
[ **DONATE** ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4126%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wr21qCJXuGvAdBxJswC1yQ&sysid=1)

HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote the liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.

Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. But his legacy of service and commitment to making America great again is at the heart of Susan’s campaign to replace him. ▶︎ Susan is a pro-life, pro-gun, pro-wall conservative ready to take on The Swamp. ▶︎ She has served Texas for three decades - working in the state legislature, advising local communities on transportation and economic issues, and fighting the Left at her husband’s side. ▶︎ She has publicly pledged to join the House Freedom Caucus. ▶︎ She has been endorsed by President Donald Trump. Susan finished first in the primary election, ahead of 22 other candidates. Now she is in the runoff up against a classic RINO who favors amnesty and opposes school choice. Never-Trump Republicans are funding Susan’s opponent, who is trying to win the July 27th runoff election with Democrat crossover votes. Conservatives must answer this challenge. President Trump supports Susan. So do grassroots conservatives in Texas and around the country. This election is HFF’s top election priority for this summer. We have to send a message to the Never-Trump RINOs that they’re not in charge anymore. Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to support conservative leadership in Washington. Sincerely, Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund | | COUNTDOWN TO JULY 27TH RUNOFF ELECTION | | House Freedom Fund 300 Independence Ave SE Washington, DC 20003 House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote the liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans. name: Justin Atkins
subject: Write Now: Your senators have the power to end the filibuster and protect voting rights
body:
| | | Our senators have the power to end the filibuster, a procedural tool dating back to Jim Crow, which has been used to block even the most common-sense legislation from ever getting a vote.
---
| [Send a letter](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32645641/296419004/-424043574?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjBmYmVjNS1iMmU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4-Fs5QA240eghjAoD4omtO_d11JrC1x7Xmh2UBeFnWE=&emci=2617d189-83e6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4b0fbec5-b2e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172) |
|
Friend,
**Last week, President Biden spoke at Philadelphia’s Constitution Center to passionately defend our right to vote amid nationwide attacks from Republican legislators.** But even as he called out the ongoing “assault on our democracy,” the president said nothing about the arcane rule that allows it to happen — and that we have the power to change.
The filibuster rule in the U.S. requires 60 votes to end floor debate on a legislative item, effectively giving the GOP minority veto power over widely popular and desperately needed legislation. Mitch McConnell has used this Jim Crow relic to block even the most common-sense reforms, including measures to end voter-suppression and ensure ballot access.
**Enough is enough. It’s time to end the filibuster and save our democracy. **
[**Send a message to your senators urging them to bypass the filibuster so we can finally fight back against major voter suppression and disenfranchisement.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32645642/296419005/-921436435?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjBmYmVjNS1iMmU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4-Fs5QA240eghjAoD4omtO_d11JrC1x7Xmh2UBeFnWE=&emci=2617d189-83e6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4b0fbec5-b2e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172)
Just last month, Republicans used the filibuster to block the For the People Act, a transformative piece of legislation that would fortify voting rights at a federal level. We must move with urgency before the John Lewis Voting Rights Act meets the same fate.
**Senate Democrats actually have the power to change and even end the filibuster.** In 2017, Mitch McConnell amended the filibuster so he could pack the Supreme Court — allowing Trump to appoint three extreme justices during his term. If the GOP was able to pull it off then, we can do it now.
**The legislative filibuster is arbitrary, obstructive, and not mentioned once in our Constitution.** This procedural rule only serves to dangerously undermine our democratic process. With passage of the John Lewis Voting Rights Act on the line, we have another chance to bring sweeping reforms to protect our right to vote. The stakes are too high to stay on the sidelines.
[**Write your senators: End the filibuster so we can finally pass the For the People Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32645643/296419006/1807446920?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjBmYmVjNS1iMmU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4-Fs5QA240eghjAoD4omtO_d11JrC1x7Xmh2UBeFnWE=&emci=2617d189-83e6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4b0fbec5-b2e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172)
Thanks for your time,
Justin Atkins
National Political Manager
NextGen America
| **NextGen America**
268 Bush St. #2919
San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | [unsubscribe](https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/2617d189-83e6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/4b0fbec5-b2e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjBmYmVjNS1iMmU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4-Fs5QA240eghjAoD4omtO_d11JrC1x7Xmh2UBeFnWE=&id=109799863)

Peter -- Democrats and BLM thugs bullied, intimidated,
harassed, threatened violence and did everything they could to
keep us from hosting our America First rally in California. . .
We refused to back down and stood up to these

us.

AGAINST HATE-AMERICA LEFTISTS
America First is here to stay and there's not
a thing the Democrats, BLM thugs, the Fake News Media, or Big
Tech can do about it.
And I'm going to continue taking them on . .

of Congress . . .
I will never back down to these hate-America
leftists.
But I can't do this alone. These same
Marxists are coming after me in 2022 and they're throwing TENS OF
MILLIONS of dollars to defeat me.
Will you stand with me and rush an emergency
donation of $25 right away?

I'm going to take my America First message

But I'm working harder to stop them. And we

These rallies give the MAGA base the momentum

I'm so thankful to have your support. America
First couldn't happen without you.

-- Marjorie Taylor Greene

body:
Where are your loyalties, Peter?

clean_body: Where are your loyalties, Peter? | Authorized by Elect Republicans HQ We can’t believe this, Peter. The socialist “Squad” is threatening our American values, and they must be stopped. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez wants the federal government to take over our economy through her radical, socialist “Green New Deal.” Ilhan Omar consistently refuses to apologize for her anti-Semitism -- like comparing the United States and Israel to terrorists like Hamas and the Taliban. Cori Bush is constantly fighting to “defund the police” and defends violent protestors like ANTIFA and Black Lives Matter. These left-wing extremists have no place in our Congress, and only a strong America First movement can defeat them. | | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

Our fundraising for July has been a little slow
#

Friend — I’m emailing you today for $3.
**Why? Full transparency, our fundraising for July has been a little slow, and we need to bring in a surge of donations today to ensure we have the resources to build a broad coalition of support in all of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties.**
We’re not taking money from corporate PACs or the fossil fuel industry, so that means $3 donations like this are a huge part of our campaign.
It’s people like you chipping in a few dollars at a time in response to emails like this that keep our movement centered on the working people I’m running to represent in Washington.

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Voter suppression in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Last week, Texas Governor Greg Abbott called a special session of the state legislature in an attempt to ram through his racist voter suppression legislation under the pretense of preventing widespread "voter fraud."
**But Republican legislators had no real evidence of voter fraud — because it’s actually very rare — and they were forced to admit as much.**
Then, something remarkable happened: dozens of Texans came out to the Capitol building to push back against the new measures and explain how their lives had been negatively impacted by voter suppression. And on Monday, Democrats in the legislature fled the state in protest of the new restrictions.
Friends, it’s clear: Americans are sick of fighting tooth and nail against the Republican Party simply to exercise their constitutionally-protected right to vote.
Congress must support the people of Texas — and Democrats in the state legislature — by abolishing the filibuster and passing comprehensive voting rights legislation like the _For the People Act_ and the _John Lewis Voting Rights Act_.
But the truth is that my allies in Congress and I are facing pushback not just from Republicans, but also some members of our own party.
The only way we’ll be able to go up against them and win is with your support - so I’m asking:
[**Can you make a contribution to my campaign today to show your support as I fight to abolish the filibuster and pass the For the People Act? Your support is critical, especially right now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32647001/296423864/-748347061?refcode2=a570474f-b6e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210719-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTcwNDc0Zi1iNmU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1lM7Hl2v1BWOYZYY-Fyboqaq8wBbFRowTL_8Qgs0tg4=)
A massive overhaul of federal voting rights legislation means we won’t have to worry about Republicans like Greg Abbott and members of the Texas legislature undermining American democracy, including in the 2022 midterm election and the next presidential election.
But every day that goes by without voting rights protections is an opportunity for Republicans to enact legislation disenfranchising people of color, young and working people, formerly incarcerated individuals, and other groups that have been historically left out of the democratic process.
That’s why I won’t back down until we abolish the filibuster and pass comprehensive voting rights legislation. **[If you’re able, please make a contribution today to support me in this endeavor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32647003/296423866/-748347061?refcode2=a570474f-b6e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210719-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTcwNDc0Zi1iNmU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1lM7Hl2v1BWOYZYY-Fyboqaq8wBbFRowTL_8Qgs0tg4=)**
Thank you, as always, for your support.
Onward,
Mondaire

clean_body: Last week, Texas Governor Greg Abbott called a special session of the state legislature in an attempt to ram through his racist voter suppression legislation under the pretense of preventing widespread "voter fraud." But Republican legislators had no real evidence of voter fraud — because it’s actually very rare — and they were forced to admit as much. Then, something remarkable happened: dozens of Texans came out to the Capitol building to push back against the new measures and explain how their lives had been negatively impacted by voter suppression. And on Monday, Democrats in the legislature fled the state in protest of the new restrictions. Friends, it’s clear: Americans are sick of fighting tooth and nail against the Republican Party simply to exercise their constitutionally-protected right to vote. Congress must support the people of Texas — and Democrats in the state legislature — by abolishing the filibuster and passing comprehensive voting rights legislation like the For the People Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. But the truth is that my allies in Congress and I are facing pushback not just from Republicans, but also some members of our own party. The only way we’ll be able to go up against them and win is with your support - so I’m asking: = A massive overhaul of federal voting rights legislation means we won’t have to worry about Republicans like Greg Abbott and members of the Texas legislature undermining American democracy, including in the 2022 midterm election and the next presidential election. But every day that goes by without voting rights protections is an opportunity for Republicans to enact legislation disenfranchising people of color, young and working people, formerly incarcerated individuals, and other groups that have been historically left out of the democratic process. That’s why I won’t back down until we abolish the filibuster and pass comprehensive voting rights legislation. = Thank you, as always, for your support. Onward, Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. name: Team Maggie
subject: Join our grassroots team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
The most vulnerable Democrat | | |
---
Hi there, We're reaching out today to ask for your support. Ever since we entered the 3rd quarter, our grassroots fundraising has taken a bit of a nosedive. While Republicans rely on corporate special interests and dark money super PACs to fund their campaigns, we rely on small-dollar donations. And with control of the Senate hinging on Maggie's seat, we can't afford to fall behind. **[So we're setting a goal to get 10,000 individual donors before the end of the week. Will you help us out by becoming one of our small-dollar supporters? name: Ras Smith
subject: re: basic needs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32647826/296426435/2118730081?refcode=fl_email_sh_20210719stories_rs_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmU0ZmU0MS1iOWU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E4gnPfy1FOl0ld2tCq6wS-5BBMygjy5IXKFg0BjLXMQ=)
---
Friend, My drive to serve as a leader in Iowa is rooted in lived experiences. I’d like to share a part of my story with you. Before my time in the legislature and after I graduated from the University of Northern Iowa, I was a strength and conditioning coach at a high school, helping student athletes train for football, track, and volleyball. It was there that I gained a better understanding of how many young people in this state go without their basic needs being met every single day. This work taught me that before we could prepare students for performance on the field, we had to prepare them for success and support in the classroom. I went on to receive my MA and then became a family support worker for a nonprofit organization called Communities in Schools, where I worked closely with middle school students, parents, and educators. While we considered graduation a long term goal, my work was regularly focused on the near term — helping kids access basic things like shoes, food, and a roof over their heads. This experience confirmed for me that time and again, Iowans’ needs aren’t being met. And far too often, it is the government that is a barrier to success, and sometimes even the reason that Iowans’ needs aren’t being met. One example stands out vividly to me. A middle school student I worked with had everything going for her... she was excelling socially, emotionally, and academically — until the Iowa GOP privatized Medicaid. Because she lived with her grandmother who lost in-home nursing care due to the changes made to Medicaid, my student stopped coming to school so she could stay home and take care of her grandmother. Her only choice was to leave school and try to keep up from home while she cared for her family. That isn’t a fair choice. Whether it’s a grandparent, younger siblings, or a disabled relative — this is a reality for many families across the state. But it’s not the Iowa I want for our children or our families, and it’s not the Iowa that reflects the values of the people of our state. There is a better path forward, one that prioritizes our most vulnerable and gets Iowa out of the business of trying to make money off of those with long-term healthcare needs. In fact, at the school I worked in, students thrived when we brought services to them: from a dental and eye clinic attached to the school, to access to clothing and food and mental health services. We need to innovate how we care for our youth and families in Iowa. **With new leadership, we can look at old problems with new eyes and create a government that gives all Iowans a fair, strong, and healthy foundation. When we do that, Iowans will not just survive — we will thrive.** [**I’d like to ask if you have a story you’d like to share with me and my team, and what you’d like to see our state government do to better meet the needs of Iowans like you. Will you share your story with us here?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32647827/296426436/-316205091?refcode=fl_email_sh_20210719stories_rs_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmU0ZmU0MS1iOWU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E4gnPfy1FOl0ld2tCq6wS-5BBMygjy5IXKFg0BjLXMQ=&emci=05e4fe41-b9e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=06e4fe41-b9e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445) **** | [SHARE YOUR STORY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32647828/296426437/-316205091?refcode=fl_email_sh_20210719stories_rs_full_xx_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmU0ZmU0MS1iOWU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E4gnPfy1FOl0ld2tCq6wS-5BBMygjy5IXKFg0BjLXMQ=&emci=05e4fe41-b9e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=06e4fe41-b9e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445)
---
I always say: what a time to be alive to do this work. Because this work is a necessity. I know that together, we can find solutions to our common struggles and make this a state where every Iowan’s basic needs are met.
Thanks for reading, and I hope to read some of your own stories soon.
Ras

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32647829/296426438/-1395442909?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmU0ZmU0MS1iOWU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E4gnPfy1FOl0ld2tCq6wS-5BBMygjy5IXKFg0BjLXMQ=&emci=05e4fe41-b9e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=06e4fe41-b9e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32647830/296426439/1661814592?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmU0ZmU0MS1iOWU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E4gnPfy1FOl0ld2tCq6wS-5BBMygjy5IXKFg0BjLXMQ=&emci=05e4fe41-b9e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=06e4fe41-b9e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32647831/296426440/283236471?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmU0ZmU0MS1iOWU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E4gnPfy1FOl0ld2tCq6wS-5BBMygjy5IXKFg0BjLXMQ=&emci=05e4fe41-b9e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=06e4fe41-b9e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445)

name: Steve Daines
subject: END Big Tech Bias!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
For years, the Big Tech overlords have been suppressing and silencing conservative voices. | [](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=bb2eab84e641478ab3c96aacb50443c9&_e=t7y7BUf7eu07S-vdk25Vje5tidVazXjOBkZ_c43TIf4Ug_UOAfFuhzblKA_SrR8RanLliHTUGyz8Z9TY-o3OgUmYoRq1ejCnXmMUyGNryNJqY4OQfOpwQJi5FMGXrZlt3uYY7JrzCrIIJ_LvFlvbg_L9zo144ASeJlcAwh8PDIfWtxlr0XJ5duph9r_Pv2oB-m3xMPSEpxDB6zEsJFSTcd6fKGYnCiFsxjxRv7SATSbTI7q0HLuPZOUbdvuHnbdbcLDkwuLABQeYlQ-66vjmlhm7HSF6P66xUF8bG7xNk11oMHe_Vqi3qXjoLUhLn37ulbfSDZua8S2x2S5stzfl3JC7ZU5BcJPVw2DvUPo9ep9Ifc2aaMQ2U7uDPRuC9HlkN2smK9yeaylE31_bbhoGIopYT8JvVIYkNHBaErz5Y48P66-cJaXks1g029mWTiWeACOpNd7VT4MgmTU18u0kguYhyZn3FQpLWmiqLpnorhYdeh6j1r4l4nrC2XyxlRqxe0zqFRAlRnhQJRNsOn2ieA%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

I introduced a new bill in the U.S. Senate to address one of the most pressing and dangerous situations we face in America today - **the highly partisan actions of “Big Tech” to censor conservatives on social media platforms.**

With President Donald Trump’s recently filed lawsuit against the Big Tech giants Facebook, Google, and Twitter for outright banning him from social media alongside the millions of Americans who are “shadow banned,” this disturbing discrimination and rampant censorship is once again in the news, _but it’s certainly nothing new._

We know the truth. For years, the Big Tech overlords have been suppressing and silencing conservative voices in a thinly veiled effort to help their left-wing globalist allies in the Democrat Party, and this grave injustice needs to end and **it needs to end NOW!**

That’s why I introduced the **“Preserving Political Speech Online Act”** in the U.S. Senate to finally crack down and end the Big Tech oligarchs ability to discriminate based on a user’s political beliefs and speech.

**[Fellow Conservative, will you join me and show how much grassroots support there is behind this fair and commonsense legislation to end Big Tech censorship and discrimination by adding your name to my “First Amendment Fairness!” Petition today?](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=bb2eab84e641478ab3c96aacb50443c9&_e=t7y7BUf7eu07S-vdk25Vje5tidVazXjOBkZ_c43TIf4Ug_UOAfFuhzblKA_SrR8RanLliHTUGyz8Z9TY-o3OgUmYoRq1ejCnXmMUyGNryNJqY4OQfOpwQJi5FMGXrZlt3uYY7JrzCrIIJ_LvFlvbg_L9zo144ASeJlcAwh8PDIfWtxlr0XJ5duph9r_Pv2oB-m3xMPSEpxDB6zEsJFSTcd6fKGYnCiFsxjxRv7SATSbTI7q0HLuPZOUbdvuHnbdbcLDkwuLABQeYlQ-66vjmlhm7HSF6P66xUF8bG7xNk11oMHe_Vqi3qXjoLUhLn37up4FeTP_zm6_iTv9WiElvKytbXCNDLXVaLCEHkILFuHn9qJDHeeOADbHGVA3RBTrdPsKWQCMCg_dI9oZXHqzLh1OWGc5g6IqQTRtxm2RJash53ljhzETl6s0m0nUTyQwMeTew1Vj7YXVBRI1i_UbEqlZzJDT0fk3O36KYEWJ_BoTWj_bPi2iM0gJrmXJbQpv-cKBGLsSoc3e-0shqv6xJ4g%3D%3D)**

clean_body: For years, the Big Tech overlords have been suppressing and silencing conservative voices. | Fellow Conservative, I introduced a new bill in the U.S. Senate to address one of the most pressing and dangerous situations we face in America today - the highly partisan actions of “Big Tech” to censor conservatives on social media platforms. With President Donald Trump’s recently filed lawsuit against the Big Tech giants Facebook, Google, and Twitter for outright banning him from social media alongside the millions of Americans who are “shadow banned,” this disturbing discrimination and rampant censorship is once again in the news, but it’s certainly nothing new. We know the truth. For years, the Big Tech overlords have been suppressing and silencing conservative voices in a thinly veiled effort to help their left-wing globalist allies in the Democrat Party, and this grave injustice needs to end and it needs to end NOW! That’s why I introduced the “Preserving Political Speech Online Act” in the U.S. Senate to finally crack down and end the Big Tech oligarchs ability to discriminate based on a user’s political beliefs and speech. Thank you, Senator Steve Daines | Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. mailto:info@stevedaines.com | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana Don't want to receive our emails?

name: Team Save America
subject: URGENT: Redistricting Meeting Announcement
body:
We need your help to testify at the CD7 Redistricting Meeting Tomorrow!
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RNGxK70G57s-wq0ZuECZPlvE0i67CvPsF5YzM3YbmJiUHzN0MMHO5EP4ddWqA6ANxkqLaGEXfXyP8byaxwhVXACFMitGGJlDB4N-J5zxRBNH3VPDZtlm6aa5jMwr0wHURZNDVnU-8y9_h4OgsZ4eE0uF_kUI7Ozl&c=sE_oiiwiMVolSzftpSehfQntRx8XvFhXkwOtDbziOjLTFZYEamZjhw==&ch=AXC0B-Gaz_gh1bnN79Tg3c5yq8v-4VYd1QStySU7bhA2ZmGQOEcuLA==)
---
| Fellow Coloradan, I am contacting you today to ask you to perform your Civic duty. As some of you may know Colorado is using a new system for the Redistricting of Colorado's State Legislative and Congressional District maps. As part of this commission, initiated by Amendments Y and Z, the State Commission is required to hear Public Comment on the proposed lines.
During these Public Comment Periods, the Democrats have controlled the narrative at the meetings, claiming the new lines aren't fair and that they should be changed back to more favorable lines for the Democrats.
The reason I am contacting you today is to ask you to step up and help us secure these proposed lines, that are fair for both sides.
Tonight at 6:00 PM there will be a Zoom Training, teaching you how to testify at the meeting and then on Tuesday, July 20th, You will testify at the Congressional District 7 Public Comment Hearing in Lakewood, CO.
Testifying at these meetings is not a scary thing, at these meetings, your comment is welcomed and wanted. Not at all like Testifying at your local School Board or the State House.
If you don't step up and fight for these new district lines, you will be handing control of the House back to Nancy Pelosi in 2022 and you will be giving the Democrats full control of the Colorado Congressional Delegation.
If the Democrats get what they want, they will take away the conservative seats of Congressman Ken Buck, Congresswoman Lauren Boebert, and Congressman Doug Lamborn. Then they will secure their already strong democrat districts for the next 10 years.
This is not a large ask, we are simply asking for a few hours of your time so that you can help Save America and Secure Colorado for Victory once again.
I want to thank you for your time and I hope you will be joining us at the training tonight and that we will see you tomorrow, in person, at the CD7 Meeting.

---
| | | [Sign Up for Training and to Testify Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RNGxK70G57s-wq0ZuECZPlvE0i67CvPsF5YzM3YbmJiUHzN0MMHO5MjyQuAZ7xAY7_umaB_0ihiR2Z7gmD_Z-io4Urkv9HNZDky-y_XrudM4LsHk6zMsQzyXyWaKfdTmI4EoHG2haNlhgFrq3WcOs2E5VSR-dE7MQrqtyf2CkyUdGq5VQuElvmzMklT9fJxJheXsChpyzJUV6vfk861X2Ue4N4eCtrLYhajLQICT86RcDmBlVYMmbc8D6-4yiihcv76dLBqeKU0AniYskIS3Ez3eEMJ8pcnHdLrx9cMawzU1vQDT14ly9B3IC2SYXqINYKJNCmBEqLGTG-N6X6EKvVatFFJRbswj&c=sE_oiiwiMVolSzftpSehfQntRx8XvFhXkwOtDbziOjLTFZYEamZjhw==&ch=AXC0B-Gaz_gh1bnN79Tg3c5yq8v-4VYd1QStySU7bhA2ZmGQOEcuLA==)
---
| Sincerely,
Weston D, Imer Founder and CEO Prodigy Consulting Group, LLC
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RNGxK70G57s-wq0ZuECZPlvE0i67CvPsF5YzM3YbmJiUHzN0MMHO5MjyQuAZ7xAYwJ31BL2QIIuyJNL8xmZ_oSloiXfmbBD-u2LQiWAo_jYUFTpn51Vf7mxrZHw7W52WZ9F47hN0sjBsPsMDj2zHZlqGNtrH_O4O0uWi5xwjx3E=&c=sE_oiiwiMVolSzftpSehfQntRx8XvFhXkwOtDbziOjLTFZYEamZjhw==&ch=AXC0B-Gaz_gh1bnN79Tg3c5yq8v-4VYd1QStySU7bhA2ZmGQOEcuLA==)

name: Team Never Again
subject: Stand with Officer Fanone
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
"I have kids." That's what Officer Michael Fanone cried out -- fearing for his life -- as he was tortured and beaten by insurrectionists on January 6. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32651017/296437716/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2ODNiMzg5LWMzZTgtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eq5eq_Z1x0-ciOyLOpVw2VUNhN0WG2LuYkZ7104h7nY=&emci=87813d06-a4e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=e683b389-c3e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16335001) "I have kids."

That's what Officer Michael Fanone cried out -- _fearing for his life_ \-- as he was **tortured and beaten** by insurrectionists on January 6.

Fanone was **tasered, beaten with a flagpole, dragged down steps, and had his badge stolen off his chest.** The attack resulted in Fanone suffering a heart attack and concussion, and it's left him with PTSD and a traumatic brain injury.

This is the horrifying reality of the violence that officers faced from Trump supporters on January 6. But instead of rallying behind the officers who served and denouncing the attacks, the Treason Caucus has tried to minimize and move on from the dangerous events that they incited. They claim to support the police, but on January 6, they put politics before everyone’s safety, and before democracy.

Fanone said what's been most difficult for him after the attack is seeing lawmakers downplay or lie about the attack for their own gain. He wants the lies to stop, saying **"I experienced firsthand an insurrection inspired by the head of our executive branch, Donald Trump, and his co-workers."**

The Treason Caucus has made it clear they'll do whatever it takes to rewrite history and escape accountability. Their disrespect to the officers is disgusting and unacceptable. We need to show them we won't stand for it.

**[Add your name to stand with Officer Fanone and all others who served on January 6 and denounce the actions of the Treason Caucus.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32651026/296437726/564748769?gpsid=8_139_19785&ms=em21_210719_office_adv_gq_act__tna_ettx&refcode=em21_210719_office_adv_gq_act__tna_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210719_office_adv_gq_act__tna_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=napac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2ODNiMzg5LWMzZTgtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eq5eq_Z1x0-ciOyLOpVw2VUNhN0WG2LuYkZ7104h7nY=&emci=87813d06-a4e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=e683b389-c3e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16335001)**

Thanks,

Never Again PAC
Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from the 147 Republican members of Congress who sought to overturn the results of a free and fair election. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32651030/296437730/-47384567?gpsid=8_139_19592&refcode=em21_210719_office_adv_gq_act__tna_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210719_office_adv_gq_act__tna_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=napac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2ODNiMzg5LWMzZTgtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eq5eq_Z1x0-ciOyLOpVw2VUNhN0WG2LuYkZ7104h7nY=)

| Peter,
The California Communists may have canceled our venues... but they can never cancel our patriotism or our American spirit.
After three different locations pulled the plug on our rally with Marjorie Taylor Greene, it became clear - [we can't let the "woketopians" silence us and restrict our freedom of speech!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EtJ9ORA6cyUUxjuOVwfxJg3Qapo5LLDCObLpSBo55DQxJIMCiTePTnf6WctRudU4iBAs2rcHI4jC6ky9OPnkKuOaDnIM43PiBf2efjS5dp9vcVx7rYP5RLibtdSuuJ2xetRkAqWNPuFcA58Apu7wiWpl3Xo7Dkumx8qkabZpcFOUEVr4B12pli6CIh5KLgwo&c=YKW9cNW4mO2feQGyV5cnjftODKmu5J_QqQZzKnQPX3apSicojBEJ0Q==&ch=40A_0AEmjtfPT27s_AHXgYr8jlDMTc4CGMMwWzXNw5mQWEMteFo_-Q==)
They may try to cancel us online... they may try to come after us in real life... they may even shut down our venues...but we will take this fight to them in the courts, in the halls of Congress, and anywhere necessary to show that their authoritarian censorship tactics can't defeat our movement!

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Peter, The California Communists may have canceled our venues... but they can never cancel our patriotism or our American spirit. After three different locations pulled the plug on our rally with Marjorie Taylor Greene, it became clear - == They may try to cancel us online... they may try to come after us in real life... they may even shut down our venues...but we will take this fight to them in the courts, in the halls of Congress, and anywhere necessary to show that their authoritarian censorship tactics can't defeat our movement! | | | == | == | It's clear what these Leftists did to try to silence us - despite their weak claims, it wasn't in the interest of "public safety." They didn't like the content of our lawful political speech, so they censored us and then bragged about it! | | | | == | | | | Thank you to all the patriots who came out and joined us anyways at protests in Riverside and Huntington Beach. We made it clear - we will not be silenced, and we will not be shut down by over-soyed City Council members in Anaheim or anyone else! Marjorie and I are going to keep fighting for YOU!!! | | | == | Thanks for keeping America First alive, | == | Matt Gaetz | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2021 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32651915/296440802/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDE4MWJhOS1jNmU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FAnUylClwRLncHIY3LH4PzyTldLl23kTF1oyCXzQNGc=) The last email stated that Travis County lagged in voter turnout compared to the national average.

We compared [county level data compiled by NBC News](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32651916/296440803/-1903354268?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDE4MWJhOS1jNmU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FAnUylClwRLncHIY3LH4PzyTldLl23kTF1oyCXzQNGc=&emci=8d195d19-96e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=70181ba9-c6e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7168977) showing the source to be National Election Pool, U.S. Census Bureau, with national data from the U.S. Census Bureau [Table 1:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32651917/296440804/-1026277692?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDE4MWJhOS1jNmU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FAnUylClwRLncHIY3LH4PzyTldLl23kTF1oyCXzQNGc=&emci=8d195d19-96e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=70181ba9-c6e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7168977) released on April 29, 2021, [2020 Presidential Election Voting and Registration Tables Now Available.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32651918/296440805/1365584589?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDE4MWJhOS1jNmU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FAnUylClwRLncHIY3LH4PzyTldLl23kTF1oyCXzQNGc=&emci=8d195d19-96e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=70181ba9-c6e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7168977)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32651919/296440806/-1903354268?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDE4MWJhOS1jNmU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FAnUylClwRLncHIY3LH4PzyTldLl23kTF1oyCXzQNGc=&emci=8d195d19-96e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=70181ba9-c6e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7168977)
However, the data sources used to make this conclusion is not an accurate apples-to-apples comparison. We felt it was important to let you know turnout based on data reported directly by the county: • Travis County voter turnout in 2020 as reported on the Travis county website: [71.06%](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32651920/296440807/278308894?emci=8d195d19-96e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDE4MWJhOS1jNmU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FAnUylClwRLncHIY3LH4PzyTldLl23kTF1oyCXzQNGc=)
• National Voter Turnout as reported by the U.S. Census Bureau: [66.8%](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32651921/296440808/-160924876?emci=8d195d19-96e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDE4MWJhOS1jNmU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FAnUylClwRLncHIY3LH4PzyTldLl23kTF1oyCXzQNGc=) In this comparison Travis County has a greater voter turnout than the national voter turnout based on the number of registered voters in the county.

Thanks,
Team Donna

Subject: Here's one way to stand with Texas Democrats

Quick update, friend.

Right now, Democrats in Texas are doing everything possible to prevent Greg Abbott from ramming through one of the worst voter suppression bills in our state's history.

Texas Democrats broke quorum and effectively blocked the GOP majority from passing Senate Bill 7 -- the GOP’s voter suppression bill. Among its many restrictive provisions, SB7 would have cut the number of polling locations and voting machines in high-propensity Democratic areas. This alone would have crushed our chances at making any electoral progress in Texas. **Democrats stopped it.**

The point is this: we are holding the line and it’s working, but we need to keep applying pressure:

**In Austin where I'm running for Congress, voter turnout in places like Travis County still lags behind the national average. That’s inexcusable. We felt it was important to let you know turnout based on data reported directly by the county: • Travis County voter turnout in 2020 as reported on the Travis county website: = • National Voter Turnout as reported by the U.S. Census Bureau: = In this comparison Travis County has a greater voter turnout than the national voter turnout based on the number of registered voters in the county. Texas Democrats broke quorum and effectively blocked the GOP majority from passing Senate Bill 7 -- the GOP’s voter suppression bill. Among its many restrictive provisions, SB7 would have cut the number of polling locations and voting machines in high-propensity Democratic areas. This alone would have crushed our chances at making any electoral progress in Texas. Democrats stopped it. The point is this: we are holding the line and it’s working, but we need to keep applying pressure: In Austin where I'm running for Congress, voter turnout in places like Travis County still lags behind the national average. While state-level Democrats fight the good fight, we must support races like ours that can drive turnout in the coming election. We've proven we know how to get Democrats to the polls -- this is our chance to finish the job in 2022. = Thank you, Donna = | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer running to flip Texas from red to blue. Team -

Welcome back to our 4th edition of the Team Scheller Newsletter! This week lets talk about what is happening in Cuba.

Over the past week, anti-Communist protests have broken out all over the County because the Cuban people are tired of the hardships imposed on them by the Castro regime that has been in power for decades. During COVID, the Communist government was unable to provide basic needs to the residents of the island, including grappling with acute shortages of food and medicine throughout the pandemic. People make lines for blocks to buy whatever they can find at stores. Inflation and blackouts have made the situation even worse.

The Cuban people are calling for freedom and you would think that all Americans would stand with them demanding the failed Communist government step down, and you would be mistaken. AOC and Black Lives Matter have gone as far as blaming the American Government for the hardships of the Cuban people.

Susan Wild's statement leaves a lot to be desired stating, “I stand in solidarity with the thousands of Cuban citizens who have been courageously defying the forces of repression to make their voices heard." Well Susan, what about the Communist government that has done this to them? Why aren't you calling out Communism as a whole?

The answer is simple, Susan Wild is a "Squad" wannabe and instead of standing up for freedom and democracy in other parts of the world, she would rather not upset the radical left in her own party.

As your Congresswoman, I will always stand up for freedom. We live in the greatest nation the world has ever seen and it is our duty to spread the message of freedom and democracy around the world.

|
---
_**Endorsements of the Week!**_
|
---
_**Lets check in on my "Wildly Liberal" Opponent**_

_The Border_
The Democrat's open border policies are costing American lives. Fentanyl found at the border has increased by 300%. Susan Wild and her Liberal cronies in Congress refuse to take action to address the dramatic rise in drugs coming into the U.S. because they care more about appeasing those in their party who want open borders and illegal immigration to run rampant.

As someone who has been in recovery for 39 years and an outspoken advocate for those currently in recovery, I believe one of the biggest reasons we need to secure our Southern Border is to stop the illegal deadly drugs that are coming through the Southern Border. I have been an outspoken advocate on this issue and that is why I founded Hope & Coffee which gets recovering addicts back into the workforce and ends the stigma of recovery. Democrats like Susan Wild care more about pleasing the radical left rather than protecting the communities they are supposed to serve. It's time to elect leaders who will work to reduce and eliminate the drugs that illegally cross our border. Elect me and I will fight tirelessly to do so.

_The Hyde Amendment_
Last edition we talked about the Democrats' plan to gut the Hyde amendment from this year's budget and I want to take a moment to talk about that and what that would mean for our Country.

The Hyde Amendment is a legislative provision barring the use of YOUR taxpayer dollars to fund abortions. Beginning in 1976, the Hyde Amendment was passed and has been included in each budget since then. However, the left just proposed a budget where the Hyde amendment would be revoked! What does that mean? It means that if successful, Nancy Pelosi and Susan Wild will make your tax-dollars go towards publicly funded abortions. As your next Congresswoman, I pledge to make sure that the Hyde Amendment stays in the budget and your taxpayer dollars do not go towards abortion. Before the Hyde Amendment took effect in 1980, an estimated 300,000 abortions were performed annually using taxpayer funds.
Far-left liberals like Susan Wild want to use your taxpayer dollars to publicly fund abortions and if they get their way, abortions will be legal up to and including day of birth.

_Elect me and I will never vote to use your tax dollars to fund abortions._

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32652560/296442758/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2NhZWFhYi1jOWU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-kaPhsf9oCmR8qL191w51eMlg4MHfzbU4Ah8RPAhvNA=&emci=9c0efe19-aee8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=77caeaab-c9e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, We already know that Donald Trump and Ted Cruz-endorsed Republican Glenn Youngkin would be a disastrous governor for Virginia. Now, he’s insulting Virginia voters by skipping the Virginia Bar Association Debate, traditionally the first debate of each governor’s race -- and one Mark never skipped. **_[We can’t let Youngkin get away with dodging Virginia voters. This poll proves they were right. Virginia is Donald Trump and the national Republican party’s best shot for a game changing win. Derek, we can’t afford to lose this race. body:
| | | I hate to reach out like this -- **[but I just learned national Republicans outspent Democratic HQ by $14 MILLION to retake power. I have never needed your help more than I do at this moment. Will you rush $1 to defend our House Majority? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-kZgwJ_)**

I am in complete disbelief.

**FIRST:** Trump teased another run for President if Republicans take back the House.

**THE****N:** Republicans sprang into action -- and just OUTSPENT us by $14 MILLION to win.

**[NOW: I’m calling for a massive Democratic response -- 3,OOO grassroots gifts before midnight -- to beat back this Republican spending spree, DEFEND our Majority, and ensure Trump NEVER holds power again. Can I count on your $1 to defend our House Majority at this critical moment? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-)**
| [MAJORITY DEFENDER CONTRIBUTION: PENDING
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $1_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/p28-)
---

I know I ask a lot of you.

But the ONLY thing standing in the way of another Trump Presidency is our House Majority.

After desecrating our rule of law...

After spreading vicious lies...

After attacking the very core of our democracy...

**[I will do everything I can to ensure Trump and his Republicans don’t regain power. But I can’t do it without you -- not when Republicans are outspending us by this absolutely alarming margin. >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/vWPEQ9~Gz_)**

I'm calling for 3,OOO grassroots Democrats to step up and help me SAVE our razor-thin Majorities.

It would mean so much to me if I could count on your $1 before midnight to defend our House Democrats.

name: Team NH GOP
subject: SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
We need your support to defend our majority in Concord

| | | | | [](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Fdonate/1/0100017abfafa65c-6dfddca9-f9eb-403d-826f-16b4f69a9417-000000/Y2iepXw8LgGsCW3I_GWxK_zEiXM=227)
---
| | Derek,

There are multiple State Representative special elections on the horizon.

On September 7th, we will elect Linda Camarota as the newest Republican State Representative from Bedford!

Because of your support, we have been able to pass the most transformational budget in the history of New Hampshire! We have ensured school choice for all Granite State students, put an end to unnecessary taxes, and provided financial stability for the future of our state!

[We need your support to retain and add to our majority in Concord!](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Fdonate/2/0100017abfafa65c-6dfddca9-f9eb-403d-826f-16b4f69a9417-000000/ma0XvTBCqS00pUWJvM1ClhfphIA=227)

---
| Elections are more expensive than ever, and the reality is that we will need your financial support in order to defeat the _out-of-state funded Democrats_.

[Can you donate $10, $25, or even $50 today to help us defend our majority in Concord?](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Fdonate/3/0100017abfafa65c-6dfddca9-f9eb-403d-826f-16b4f69a9417-000000/7se9rLNCLs7m9iaFaB6YOFTzvg0=227) 97% of every donation goes directly toward electing Republicans!
