name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: This is a hard truth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Peter --

I’m writing to you today to tell you a hard truth about what it will take to flip this Senate seat and then, I’m going to ask you to make a small donation to my campaign. But before I do, I want to share why I decided to run against Ron Johnson in the first place.

The truth is, I never planned to run for public office. But when Scott Walker tried to consolidate power and get rid of Wisconsin’s fiscal watchdog, I knew I had to do something about it. So, I launched a grassroots effort to take him on and save the State Treasurer’s office.

**Our scrappy campaign won with 62% of the vote statewide -- the kind of landslide victory that just doesn't happen in Wisconsin.**

Then, I decided to run for the office that I worked so hard to save -- defeating my Republican opponent by more than 100,000 votes and even winning back Trump counties! And in communities across Wisconsin, I won more votes than Democrats at the top of the ticket -- defying traditional ballot drop-off.

That should tell you a lot about me, Peter. I didn’t run for public office for fame, money, or power. I first ran because I believed the people of Wisconsin deserved to have someone fighting in their corner, not bending to the will of wealthy donors and corporate interests.

From Milwaukee to Ashland to La Crosse and everywhere in-between, I’ve proven that I can compete and win all over our beautiful state. That’s why I’m mounting my third grassroots campaign -- this time, for the United States Senate.

**Ron Johnson hasn’t just lost touch with Wisconsin workers and families, he’s lost touch with reality.** And folks in our state have had enough of leaders who govern by conspiracy theory. We had plenty of that with Donald Trump.

We need someone who will fight for the kitchen-table issues that matter most to everyday families -- like access to quality, affordable health care, good-paying jobs, protecting the right to vote, and building an economy that works for everyone. That’s why I’m in this fight.

With our Democratic Senate majority hanging in the balance by just one seat, all eyes will be on our race. _CNN_ has already called Ron Johnson the most vulnerable incumbent GOP Senator up in 2022, and _The Cook Political Report_ just moved Wisconsin from Lean Republican to Toss-Up. Wisconsin is heating up.

Peter, if we want to beat Ron Johnson at the ballot box, I’ll need your help to build another winning campaign because flipping this seat will require lots of grassroots support from folks like you. So, I’m personally asking:

**Would you consider adding a small donation to my campaign today? I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means anything you can contribute will make a meaningful difference in our race to flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat and defeat Ron Johnson. There’s a lot to accomplish together, Peter. This campaign is for you and powered by you -- and that's why I’m so grateful to have you as part of our team.

We all deserve better than Ron Johnson, and I’m personally asking you to join me in this campaign to help make sure we have what it takes to defeat him.

Thanks for reading, and thanks for all you do.

— Sarah

Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. name: Team Crist
subject: Make Gov. DeSantis a one-term governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
And only Charlie Crist can make this happen.
|
---

| | | Friend,

Gov. Ron DeSantis is trying to build a Florida for Some. A Florida for him, his rich donors, and his friends. **_Every action he takes, and every decision he makes, is geared toward helping him and his friends._**

He signed a voter suppression bill into law to help his 2022 reelection chances. He opened the first pop-up COVID-19 vaccine sites in wealthy Florida neighborhoods full of his political donors. And he failed to lead during the pandemic.

**We _must_ make Ron DeSantis a one-term governor -- and only Charlie Crist can make that happen. A recent head-to-head poll even has him within the margin of error against DeSantis!**

**[Will you donate whatever you can to Charlie's campaign for governor?](https://act.myngp.com/el/MAqMKyS3l6r8_sQOUIbYbQ==/sfl-xbsBxi0BmKnFHb1v-A==?refcode=20210719.2_f_1_fl&amount=25)** | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Gov. DeSantis is also using the governorship as a stepping stone to run for president in 2024 -- and has thrown Floridians by the wayside in the process.

Clearly, he doesn't have Florida's best interests at heart.

**But Charlie Crist has always put Floridians first.** From his time as a state senator, to serving as Florida's 44th governor, he's always honored the Golden Rule, working to build unity rather than fueling division.

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District against Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who has turned his back on Central Valley families for two decades. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy.

One more thing: Devin Nunes is terrified of losing to us. We came so close in 2020, even though Nunes outspent our campaign four-to-one. Make no mistake: Devin Nunes is vulnerable, but we need every good Democrat to step up and do their part to beat him.

Peter, the clock is ticking. If we don’t raise $1,354 before midnight, our ad fund will go bust, and Devin Nunes will get away with his lies. name: Doug Ose
subject: FW: Critical Race Theory in Schools
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OSE FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Just wanted to make sure that you got my last email and have had a chance to respond with your thoughts. I want to know your thoughts on the Radical-L Peter, Just wanted to make sure that you got my last email and have had a chance to respond with your thoughts. I want to know your thoughts on the Radical-Left’s Critical Race Theory curriculum, and their plan to teach children in schools that they are a racist. [**Do you think that our kids should be taught Critical Race Theory in school?**](http://links.oseforcalifornia.com/u/click?_t=78684e7b2de84f238080f8985a821465&_m=ffed34f1c2914b0aa2a672090f76d6e4&_e=C_mzmZsD1v5jeInlM1_wPLRIxgK_lA9B4HUsa7vPjgjzL6AFCEboWEITwdIQhKR69NlCfpRxXhdzuBPxpgTmM5DxXskN6NuLKiCYViWCzrpsBu3MPoWCPklBoMZr1LwS9_7vf_9WrYhHs7baO99NSdp3apT61FWNJ0SrkDcRR5OfcevyOpAn2UkvSqfBmUk6_x0mx068IddpR4tDjILWQECILni9ty3PEMyYw9KLwCdzAhLRajEYF9lqbOexkWGUknN5WhbUiMnRnDkkLnpmSgmdsrafX5CLfGKzX9udmXCr_iBYt_TGBXCmtzm2VaHNyMM45Vtx3UHjZqirIc-oAccnrIL1tGGLQsGxuOvlCOA2r3gUEdJCQg9FwwXesu3g6ThUkktdtzzq1atNHbemDzowqL2oxC4FxsmBvCg7s4ehZ9UGciENTe4ysFriSJ8v) [**YES**](http://links.oseforcalifornia.com/u/click?_t=78684e7b2de84f238080f8985a821465&_m=ffed34f1c2914b0aa2a672090f76d6e4&_e=C_mzmZsD1v5jeInlM1_wPLRIxgK_lA9B4HUsa7vPjgjzL6AFCEboWEITwdIQhKR69NlCfpRxXhdzuBPxpgTmM5DxXskN6NuLKiCYViWCzrpsBu3MPoWCPklBoMZr1LwS9_7vf_9WrYhHs7baO99NSdp3apT61FWNJ0SrkDcRR5OfcevyOpAn2UkvSqfBmUk6FGA4vkfRkl47W5cKExUkLsbVbMvREBUOCUIHgqDoI_cMC0We65VsNcAtsdDzWfwSH5_YAIuS5IcCzuq1SDkHRhpOF_l5iVFP5g5nuUvdOpb206L0ddrN0xkavqiHAL5x6tsanjL2027mjYjhOS0gHGTQnzwR0UPHRM0tKYBBDnK0nvcbgnD4cBKp9gYayMdjSnldltrNbGNC-J_Muoyc_l1O8SXxbKaBSjJO-lHEh7yB06QJNT8kVZsrwbmx6OZT) [**NO**](http://links.oseforcalifornia.com/u/click?_t=78684e7b2de84f238080f8985a821465&_m=ffed34f1c2914b0aa2a672090f76d6e4&_e=C_mzmZsD1v5jeInlM1_wPLRIxgK_lA9B4HUsa7vPjgjzL6AFCEboWEITwdIQhKR69NlCfpRxXhdzuBPxpgTmM5DxXskN6NuLKiCYViWCzrpsBu3MPoWCPklBoMZr1LwS9_7vf_9WrYhHs7baO99NSdp3apT61FWNJ0SrkDcRR5OfcevyOpAn2UkvSqfBmUk6W78rGW3MtAeHPX35mutgy2vPlvVGgE-GsQnBGoxSciCVtAxK6P4NItvqjpgZUFVhxird6iSlxZCsOuT3nd9vtYqF0RNZr3DazjyQccPo9KO6a_u2QxYfxyKTxSpLUY5NMYuAZoaYDF-7BR4ewGwLpyHb7Ywt87IeNEvqVi1Y1l2AlHJOFpWCm9SE4Pe6Wlfk2TWi9J0zEzKS_5JQwIfLI7kMmnaTLHMoAI69XWi1zso-bwuyLExPOA2c62zeNMSR) Biden and the Far-Left plan to use Critical Race Theory to drive division between Americans. By teaching false principles in schools, this will only create more division between parents of students and our future generations. Critical Race Theory goes against the values that have made this country so great. It goes against the teachings of historic civil rights leaders - their teachings were of unity and equality, and Critical Race Theory teaches of division and treachery. While Gavin Newsom has had every chance to protect California from the radical left’s agenda, he instead continues to support the teaching of division and hatred within schools. **Let me know what you think: Do you think that Newsom and the Far-Left should be allowed to implement Critical Race Theory in schools - bringing more division into our great nation?** Schools cannot be the safe learning environment they need to be when Newsome and the Far-Left are allowed to push their woke agendas upon the students. We must protect the highly valued education of children. **[Peter, I am eager to hear from you and to understand where you stand on Critical Race Theory. Let me know what you think immediately!](http://links.oseforcalifornia.com/u/click?_t=78684e7b2de84f238080f8985a821465&_m=ffed34f1c2914b0aa2a672090f76d6e4&_e=C_mzmZsD1v5jeInlM1_wPLRIxgK_lA9B4HUsa7vPjgjzL6AFCEboWEITwdIQhKR69NlCfpRxXhdzuBPxpgTmM5DxXskN6NuLKiCYViWCzrpsBu3MPoWCPklBoMZr1LwS9_7vf_9WrYhHs7baO99NSdp3apT61FWNJ0SrkDcRR5OfcevyOpAn2UkvSqfBmUk6GrMguxj8nXtOZkDZ2nxF6xqPD9sbnFvmOPCnJ8KBP4Kk60uhoTk7xpGD_UVFyWvkGRvCvLqbrPDbKqaHG10lxKPcNX2VSw8IZDl8D2bpMEyag2XrLkVmPOBj6hQagvlCn5vBzUricc2fv9b-Q7bqDDr_S8X4syqs2R_17pyrjHKGneZc-oDyUdcb3oxSXaUJ5y1Fc-zygxLz_61X3WI2tT3JxwAkyLKHMgB_BTLKXN3WfcpTZq20MDq0WM2B3YeX)** \-- Doug Ose \--------Forwarded Message Below------- Peter, Have you heard that the Biden Administration just released a statement backing the nationwide teaching of Critical Race Theory curricula? [](http://links.oseforcalifornia.com/u/click?_t=78684e7b2de84f238080f8985a821465&_m=ffed34f1c2914b0aa2a672090f76d6e4&_e=C_mzmZsD1v5jeInlM1_wPLRIxgK_lA9B4HUsa7vPjgjzL6AFCEboWEITwdIQhKR69NlCfpRxXhdzuBPxpgTmM5DxXskN6NuLKiCYViWCzrpsBu3MPoWCPklBoMZr1LwS9_7vf_9WrYhHs7baO99NSdp3apT61FWNJ0SrkDcRR5OfcevyOpAn2UkvSqfBmUk6GrMguxj8nXtOZkDZ2nxF69kcbrmibo9sTeqqdwoQOaafh7Z_a7lIm7v8iPnQDCwJl6YJKI8UboMDGVA54JmKisiJrkAK3F3t1GZXSyNLSbvm0CBMT0oS4mL93-X8d7QR2OTDg_-fKckQmV64VrryKk1S6lI_3GbgU5GKTvor3uKDuYDG0OygyLk02wq57WbltJ2Jgb7UTNAkYxrNQRRqRls8VlS_vDf8-DLpkBN3_DUhXd891WP39uu9uILBoa7i) Biden and members of the far left like Gavin Newsom claim that falsely teaching that America is systematically racist is part of our history, and that people today and throughout history should not be judged based on their character, but on their race and the color of their skin. It is clear that Joe Biden and Gavin Newsom are not trying to better this fine nation or this fine state by pushing critical race theory on it. **They have an agenda to divide the nation based on the race of its citizens. ** Now, I want to know what you think of Critical Race Theory and the plan of making it a nationwide taught curriculum within schools. **[Do you think Critical Race Theory should be taught in our schools?](http://links.oseforcalifornia.com/u/click?_t=78684e7b2de84f238080f8985a821465&_m=ffed34f1c2914b0aa2a672090f76d6e4&_e=C_mzmZsD1v5jeInlM1_wPLRIxgK_lA9B4HUsa7vPjgjzL6AFCEboWEITwdIQhKR69NlCfpRxXhdzuBPxpgTmM5DxXskN6NuLKiCYViWCzrpsBu3MPoWCPklBoMZr1LwS9_7vf_9WrYhHs7baO99NSdp3apT61FWNJ0SrkDcRR5OfcevyOpAn2UkvSqfBmUk6Kuxcs31pKBLdeKWFu9cFxLaZyTcW5aZVfxDz8jsP66PJlfKeiYt4wlPzAYh_YLd1vL8S4I7UPl0nHZe4CFyAXas49KCEeXorKKVSPbEF5DBffd1NqMJZVBtQgj4XxlwSkuiIUFG-i42e5JV2zppiLZIJA4VKOovobT_b0-oLtFu4wHrz0X1xBuUa9fxaPfnPbtPDv6NBCbJBtYuJcUKHAX0vLVxS8ZQ_40rZ9jnyRJNNWxGBeJqzhcYUQVoNL1Ut)** [**YES**](http://links.oseforcalifornia.com/u/click?_t=78684e7b2de84f238080f8985a821465&_m=ffed34f1c2914b0aa2a672090f76d6e4&_e=C_mzmZsD1v5jeInlM1_wPLRIxgK_lA9B4HUsa7vPjgjzL6AFCEboWEITwdIQhKR69NlCfpRxXhdzuBPxpgTmM5DxXskN6NuLKiCYViWCzrpsBu3MPoWCPklBoMZr1LwS9_7vf_9WrYhHs7baO99NSdp3apT61FWNJ0SrkDcRR5OfcevyOpAn2UkvSqfBmUk69wzeKl2HytSovXm1lj8jfcjYTm0-P1qISDH7Vllij7TdTwvhITL7DCGjLyoeR6M2LEpWAzGXDstwKVBJ9mE6V45kb3giMuPq9fR3T--Ssm9gdtxOGtO_sa50WpzjPjYkf4dJejzwR4BDiu8cndMcGqRvLV-ZemjgHUGAiN8iONWfsdFeVtZiFY-vpanhEPBrTB7oP4Qgda8h6Lrm3VQijDuX_v4MB_dN6Z-Q-faXZtp9qBma0L-qQiP2MQCHoyxY) [**NO**](http://links.oseforcalifornia.com/u/click?_t=78684e7b2de84f238080f8985a821465&_m=ffed34f1c2914b0aa2a672090f76d6e4&_e=C_mzmZsD1v5jeInlM1_wPLRIxgK_lA9B4HUsa7vPjgjzL6AFCEboWEITwdIQhKR69NlCfpRxXhdzuBPxpgTmM5DxXskN6NuLKiCYViWCzrpsBu3MPoWCPklBoMZr1LwS9_7vf_9WrYhHs7baO99NSdp3apT61FWNJ0SrkDcRR5OfcevyOpAn2UkvSqfBmUk6yjC9-Q7w0AwowPMy-rl7Udd9AuqOJrGv9X87iZK9Eh6ZfrOXlVLS_B3jVt0RX-5ZfBr8_9Muh5rZxXvBviUH8_u0qI98yAGsVAfvuAQhnCgwbtOGMjhXtBacq-YrWecf4-UEZQRft60FPqTllCFMm_DAkW4MeUY4jTd2K4ut5DfXAi2GP9PFKZI3Kbp05bC_7QTRoDKp15OfFPUtVWTHvXrpdEqoTpZyfowaJwqCN4Hpj6LrvmF5CtpNEkckd0Nc) The Biden administration is working to divide Americans and plant the seed of hatred in future generations. In his role as their biggest cheerleader, Gavin Newsom is complicit in the Biden administration’s state-sponsored racism. There are many ways to make sure that equality is upheld and that racism is put to an end - but forcing Critical Race Theory upon our children in schools will only bring about more hurt. Today’s children are learning the opposite lessons. Right now, in classrooms across the country, they are being taught that America is a fundamentally evil country. We cannot allow these attempts to divide our country prevail. With your help and support, we can stop Critical Race Theory and champion our American values. Unapologetically American, | Mike Pompeo | | | | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE. PO BOX 2485 SPRINGFIELD, VA 22152 “

subject: Just say NO to possibly the stupidest idea ever...
body:
And the latest winner for "dumbest idea" is Trump crony Matt Gaetz, who wants to make Trump Speaker of the House if Republicans win it back next year.
| | | | |
---
| | | | [**SIGN ON NOW TO TELL TRUMP:
_HELL NO, YOU WON’T BE THE NEXT SPEAKER OF THE HOUSE!_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T030008d0-13c3-4a6a-926f-0600f796633b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T647beca9-3ca8-46f5-9b1d-aadcd42a459c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3b904915-372d-49bb-b8d0-896c4aa7aa29/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | Look, we thought we were finally done with Trump when lost the election and got kicked off Twitter. Yeah, we knew he’d be back in 2024, like a stubborn fungus, but we figured we had some time.

**But now, his crony Matt Gaetz is talking about making him Speaker of the House if Republicans win it back next year!**(It sounds crazy, but it is unclear that the Speaker has to actually be a member).

We don’t want to see Trump’s face ever again. _And he certainly doesn’t deserve to ever hold a position of power again._

[**_So please, friend, sign now to tell Trump ‘HELL NO, you won’t be the next Speaker of the House!’ → _**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb611907c-4f80-46aa-8f47-1b2b43b734c1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

subject: Do you support Trump + Gingrich in their work to update the Contract with America?

subject: What is Ron Johnson thinking?

body:
Ron Johnson has become a national lightning rod for issues that even some Republicans think are too radical and far-right. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32659886/296468708/211588299?refcode=EM_FR_210719FR_N_drj_90DA_4_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGQ2NjhlMS1lMGU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PuIuXvxgzrfbw_7_xH_iAoWDUPPpuhEWs7SoBHYe4CM=)

| Peter,

Over the last few months Wisconsinites have had one question: What is Ron Johnson thinking?

He’s become a national lightning rod for issues that even some Republicans think are too radical and far-right. Everyday Wisconsinites aren’t benefiting from his conspiracy theories and radical beliefs, and he even said that climate change is “bullsh*t.”

It’s time for change, and Alex Lasry is ready to bring change to Wisconsin. We need a new kind of leadership, one that will work hard to put money back in the pockets of Wisconsinites who need it -- not the corporate special interests.

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: The opioid crisis is a public health crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Dear Peter,

Last year, 93,000 people died from drug overdoses.

That's a devastatingly high number -- and a new record for our country. This staggering number of deaths was due in part to the COVID-19 pandemic taking resources away from efforts to stop the opioid crisis, as well as the continued spread of the synthetic opioid fentanyl, a dangerous and deadly drug.

It's clear that the opioid crisis is far from over. In fact, we need to be more committed than ever to tackling this crisis. Each day about two people die of an opioid-related overdose in Washington, and thousands more struggle with addiction. We can never get the lives we've lost back, but we can prevent future tragedies by taking meaningful action. This issue has impacted far too many families.

**[Will you join me in the fight to combat the opioid crisis? Add your name to recommit to ending this crisis once and for all.](https://act.myngp.com/el/mKoRIxMhBS8SWpjKkIygkNc2viNa20h4rOsOsVnCvZc=/o5dvPGqZKOdATLikWVBWy7-NZfRwG95SMw46vdUjxPs=?gpsid=50_115_19789&ms=em21_210719_opioid_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&refcode=em21_210719_opioid_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210719_opioid_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

I'm proud to have worked on several pieces of legislation to address the opioid crisis. My colleagues and I have written bills to fund recovery centers, limit the use of opioids in hospitals, address the shortage of substance use disorder professionals, and much more.

The work must continue. I'm committed to doing everything I can to combat this grave public health crisis, and I hope you will join me in the fight.

**[Please, take action to address the opioid crisis by adding your name next to mine. Sign on today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/mKoRIxMhBS8SWpjKkIygkNc2viNa20h4rOsOsVnCvZc=/o5dvPGqZKOdATLikWVBWy7-NZfRwG95SMw46vdUjxPs=?gpsid=50_115_19789&ms=em21_210719_opioid_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&refcode=em21_210719_opioid_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210719_opioid_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

P.S. If you or someone you know is struggling with opioid use, please visit **[the Washington State Health Department's website for resources and help.](https://act.myngp.com/el/mKoRIxMhBS8SWpjKkIygkNc2viNa20h4rOsOsVnCvZc=/u3xDf_49r4JWPmvVjb_zPA0r0xfxxZ61uv4SN2tGq2I=)**

Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
---

People for Derek Kilmer
PO Box 1381
Tacoma WA 98402 United States

clean_body: We need your name on the Official Supporters List. | Peter, On July 24, President Donald J. Trump is taking the stage for his “Rally to Protect Our Elections” in the Battleground State of Arizona. Remember: Arizona has been undertaking a forensic audit of the questionable 2020 Election results. Arizona is one of the TOP BATTLEGROUND STATES for both the 2022 Midterms and the 2024 Presidential Election, and we have to be certain that we can trust the results. Before President Trump steps out onto that stage, we’re giving him a list of the TOP SUPPORTERS who are standing by his side as he fights for Election Integrity. As one of the most active Republicans in Englewood, FL, we need your name on that list, Peter. | OFFICIAL SUPPORTER RECORD EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #040945 DEADLINE: 7:00 PM on July 24 SUGGESTED GIFT: $35 or more | | | | | | | If your name isn’t on this Official List ahead of the July 24th Rally, it’ll be a huge red flag that your support is faltering, Peter. Rather than explain why you sat on the sidelines, we’d much rather proudly proclaim how you stood up to help SAVE AMERICA when President Trump needed you most. So please hurry, Peter. Time is running out! Donald J. Trump Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans |

clean_body: Enough is enough, Peter. | Big Tech keeps getting worse, Peter. FIRST: Tech Companies like Google and Facebook started censoring conservatives. THEN: They TOTALLY SILENCED President Trump -- depriving the sitting President of a critical channel for exercising his First Amendment right. NOW: Facebook is urging its users to report their neighbors for “extremism.” See for yourself (below)! Facebook is becoming the proverbial “Big Brother,” and they need to be reigned in before it’s too late. Will you help us fight back, Peter? | | | | | | Tech Companies like Facebook have grown far too powerful, Peter. They need to be restrained. From their glass towers in Silicon Valley, they are trying to control our democracy and silence our conservatives. It’s totally unacceptable. | Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

Peter,

My team and I found out this morning that my far-Left opponent OUTRAISED my campaign in the second quarter by more than $300,000. This has me pretty worried, despite the half of what he raised came from corporate PACS and lobbyists in Washington, D.C.

**[For me, falling short isn’t an option, which means we have our work cut out for us in the third quarter. Starting today.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=bdb6ed48e5c94df391d9a482362eac06&_e=2RhNv7u9g_YadgU2RmO9icgO-C4KGUmFoMC3K2sJYc2RBs2zWrvNVBTeUHKaIIhM0TgQh5s090wjxbJ_U5Xka1j7m9lmMLrNI0sjBn4vhDhVz7r35s0Ia5kmRjwGoE0vjLsEBVkUtDAAgX-nu_esBj_JBOuRJrz6b6-CQHOeaeC39PYLP0Ca4UaZ5OdINREyk1QPmlh-p5vkmmbUcp2xSGlc71aJpxNPn5c-TAoVYFIF30Z80MKyAcelJw15cHg-6Q341M0QIZf-xYkgrvpiWDbX-cWGUeFfahcciOUClAA5um-jIiVYAApCqevdy6WxQE79K1MJPgWlrHPI_MHkTyg1lk_KMKdOk33EYHe04Lsyr_FrMller4LYAFeNZBR2OFRsaty0a7eN-RfrDhjDZB-FaL-vaXbASiDgJwGejrFKH-fgi2Ce6BhV6q9yyrR2owl67fQ6GLXLnCtHHnW2pA%3D%3D)**

body:
I am outraged, Peter.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32662187/296475076/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjc1NTExMS1lYmU4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jYssQjfKHukI0KMoPwlBO7V2s0IYJrXpNrEtQlQzo60=)

Peter, on Saturday, MAGA Republicans Marjorie Taylor Greene and Matt Gaetz were scheduled to speak in OUR district-- after they got kicked out of Orange County.

**These despicable characters have harassed Members of Congress, stalked victims of gun violence, spread hate and violence, and perpetuated Trump's LIES about the Jan. 6th MAGA insurrection.**

They’re the lowest of the low. I am outraged that they came to our district to spread their vitriol.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Virginia=20Justice=20Democrats?=
subject: NEW EVENTS: VAJD isn't taking a break for long this summer.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Virginia Justice Democrats
body:
| | | | [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=e47e450956&e=76fc145c69)
---
| | | Hey Derek -

It may be the summer but the Virginia Justice Dems are still hard at work. We wanted to give you a few new events that we and our allies are putting together. We hope you can join us!
---
| [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=2c957ad1c7&e=76fc145c69)
---
|
---
| Network NOVA's Women Summit team is coming to Harrisonburg on July 23 - 24, 2021 to meet with the local Dems and activists to support the local candidates and to bring some great programs where you can join in as well. You are invited to join the fun and events starting on Friday, (July 23) with **Delegate Chris Hurst **in attendance as well as on Saturday (July 24) at 8:30 am to 11 am for **the Power Breakfast** with Mayor Reed, the local candidates, Women's Summit sponsors, and two great programs: **Power Building for Good**** ** led by Sam Rasoul and then **Running for Office in Red Rural Districts** – Meredith Dean of Appalachian Women of Action.

After the breakfast, we will head to the local Democratic Headquarters at around 12:30 pm to rally for the 1 PM canvass for Bill Helsley and **for VAJD Candidate Jennifer Kitchen** [Join us and invite your friends](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=e989299ac8&e=76fc145c69)!
---
| The 5th annual Women's Summit Events will be in 3 different locations this year: Northern Virginia, Harrisonburg, and Virginia Beach which is all included in your ticket!

_**[We want to see you THIS WEEKEND:](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=b2f4e8de08&e=76fc145c69) **_[Check out and get your tickets here.](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=456183ee7b&e=76fc145c69)
---
| [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=cef5754b2a&e=76fc145c69)
---
| Join us and our allies in Un-PAC for a Direct Action on July 20th at 1 PM to directly confront that corruption and pressure our U.S Senators to pass the For the People Act. [Join us to fix our broken democracy!](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=e03703926e&e=76fc145c69)

The For the People Act is a historical democracy reform legislation. The main obstacle to getting it passed is DARK MONEY’s hold on our elected officials.

Young people and students will be hosting a "satirical" 10 minute press conference, dressed as a Corporate lobbyists to highlight the corruption our elected officials take part in. The event will feature multiple speakers acting as corporate lobbyists where they will deliver speeches and "Thank You" Cards to their Senators expressing "gratitude" for protecting their corporate self interests, instead of the well being of the public and our democracy. The event will be documented by press.
[RSVP HERE ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=c62f81d343&e=76fc145c69)
---
|
---
| Please join the Our Revolution Northern Virginia July 25, 2021 6:30pm virtual meeting! Hear from **Lori Wallach, Public Citizen Global Trade Watch Director; Joe Lauria, Consortium News Editor-in-Chief; and Gareth Porter, Independent investigative journalist, historian, and writer;** will address the provocative topics of Big Pharma's role in limiting COVID vaccine access; Big Tech’s Trojan horse attack to stop the breakup of monopolies and efforts to protect privacy; the assault on whistleblower Julian Assange; and the deliberate systemic deception that is the basis of U.S. military buildup since the Cold War.
[RSVP HERE ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=38b14f1301&e=76fc145c69)

Hope to see you at one of these great events!
Virginia Justice Democrats
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=31aa7c3543&e=76fc145c69 "DONATE NOW")
---
| _Virginia Justice Democrats is independent from the national Justice Democrats. Our focus is on Virginia issues. Although we are in communication we do not take directions or instructions from the national organization. VAJD sets our own state-specific platforms, organizational structure, mission, and candidate vetting process. [Become a sustaining donor for just $5/month. ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=87dc56b54e&e=76fc145c69)_
---
| _Paid for and Authorized by Virginia Justice Democrats.

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues Defense Department for Records of Critical Race Theory Training at West Point
body:
In April, Congressman Mike Waltz (R-Fl), a West Point graduate, made public “examples of Corps of Cadets being mandated to attend seminars and presentations on critical race theory that included inflammatory lessons and presentations that are detrimental to the mission and morale of the U.S. Army.”

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Jul 19, 2021

The 2018 law, known as Senate Bill 826, requires every publicly held corporation headquartered in California to have at least one director “who self-identifies her gender as a woman” on its board of directors by December 31, 2019. The law requires corporations have up to three such persons on their boards by December 31, 2021, depending on the size of the board. The taxpayers challenging the provision claim that the quota violates the Equal Protection clause of the California Constitution. In April, Congressman Mike Waltz (R-Fl), a West Point graduate, made public “examples of Corps of Cadets being mandated to attend seminars and presentations on critical race theory that included inflammatory lessons and presentations that are detrimental to the mission and morale of the U.S. Army.” == ---|--- | | | | | In its short tenure the Biden administration has extended a special reprieve for five different groups of illegal immigrants living in the U.S. The most recent was renewed a few days ago for thousands of people from Yemen, the Middle Eastern Islamic nation well known as an Al Qaeda breeding ground. The 2018 law, known as Senate Bill 826, requires every publicly held corporation headquartered in California to have at least one director “who self-identifies her gender as a woman” on its board of directors by December 31, 2019. The law requires corporations have up to three such persons on their boards by December 31, 2021, depending on the size of the board. The taxpayers challenging the provision claim that the quota violates the Equal Protection clause of the California Constitution. = ---|--- | | | | = | = The details of the Biden administration’s (mis)handling of the border crisis remain a mystery to many, but Judicial Watch is fighting hard to get the most pressing questions answered. Concerned about the impacts of President Biden’s lax border policy, Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton is raising important questions about the lack of immigration law enforcement. “Is our country being harmed, are citizens being harmed, are illegal aliens being harmed?” Fitton stated Friday. = ---|--- | | | == The Washington Examiner Over 300,000 have signed a petition from one of Washington’s top watch dogs demanding that a special counsel be appointed to investigate allegations that President Biden and family members, notably budding artist and son Hunter Biden, have profited off public service. == = The New York Post The Defense Department doled out millions of dollars to the same nonprofit that funneled federal grant money to the Wuhan Institute of Virology for bat coronavirus research — with most of the Pentagon money going toward murky research on countering biological weapons. = = Just the News The Department of Justice and the FBI should be held accountable for their ongoing misconduct by having their funding slashed by half, said Tom Fitton, president of Judicial Watch. “[T]he Justice Department’s been a disaster for a number of years,” Fitton told the John Solomon Reports podcast. “The FBI has been out of control. There’s been zero accountability for the misconduct that we’ve been talking about for years now. = = = = = = = | CLIPS | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

name: me, Scalise, DeSantis (2)
subject: This is BY FAR the most important email you'll read this year. 📨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Here's your chance to make an essential difference for the future of America.
Hello, it's Steve Scalise here following up for Ron DeSantis.
**This is BY FAR the most important email you'll read this year.**
President Trump made it crystal clear that he needs ALL Conservatives \-- including me, you, and Ron -- to do our part to defend our America first movement.
[**Ron asked for your help. Now I'm asking for it too. Here's your chance to make an essential difference for the future of America.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57968157:JJu9FzlON:m:1:3253819041:1B267844A5EF76092B7809A247A90CB5:r)
If $25 or $50 is too much, I completely understand. Every little bit helps when the stakes are this high. Even just $5 or $10 can make a world of difference.
Please send in support before it's too late. We really need you.
_\-- Steve Scalise (Republican Whip)_
_\---------- Forwarded Message ----------_
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57968157:JJu9FzlON:m:1:3253819041:1B267844A5EF76092B7809A247A90CB5:r)
From: **Ron DeSantis**
Subject: You know me. I'm not one to mince words.

Hey Peter, it's Governor Ron DeSantis. You know me -- I'm not one to mince words.
**Neither is President Trump.**
That's why I proudly supported him when he just made this bold statement: _" The survival of America depends upon our ability to elect Republicans at every level."_
The Liberal Media, the Radical Socialists in Congress, and Joe Biden's cronies are plowing ahead to fundamentally change everything that makes America great.
[**I 'm asking for you to help Republicans right now!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57968158:JJu9FzlON:m:1:3253819041:1B267844A5EF76092B7809A247A90CB5:r)
Our country is at a crossroad.
We either let the Democrats turn America into a Socialist country and tear President Trump's legacy apart...
**OR we come together and prove that our America first movement is worth fighting for!**
[**If every Patriot chips in a few bucks, we will have the resources to elect Republicans up and down the ballot!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57968157:JJu9FzlON:m:1:3253819041:1B267844A5EF76092B7809A247A90CB5:r)
_This won't be easy -- we need your help._
...And you don't strike me as someone who gives up when the going gets tough.
**That 's why I'm coming directly to you, Peter. Are you in?**
For America,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57968157:JJu9FzlON:m:1:3253819041:1B267844A5EF76092B7809A247A90CB5:r)
Ron DeSantis

Our first official campaign office is opening in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, at the end of the summer. 😎
Before long it will look like your typical, scrappy campaign office. It will be filled with clipboards, dedicated volunteers, field literature, organizers, snacks, and lots of PPE.
**But the biggest and best part of our new Pittsburgh office will be our Grassroots Donor Wall — a physical space with the names of folks from all across the country who donate to John Fetterman for U.S. Senate!**
We’re already running out of space to add additional names to our Grassroots Donor Wall. **This is the record we have on file for you right now:**
**_Grassroots Donor Wall Record #169_** **Name:** Peter **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **Donor Wall Status:** Not Active. — Team Fetterman HQ

name: Erica Smith
subject: Can you chip in for gas?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
When I say our grassroots campaign is fueled by you, I mean it literally!
#
When I say you fuel our grassroots campaign, I mean it _literally_!
Last month, we launched our _100 Counties, 100 Day Tour_ — our campaign’s first-ever statewide tour, and a critical opportunity to connect with North Carolina voters in every single county. And since then, we’ve had conversations with hundreds of voters in 35 counties!
But here’s the truth: Visiting all 100 North Carolina counties in 100 days requires an ambitious schedule, a lot of faith, and a _ton of resources_.
**I don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, lobbyists, or fossil fuel companies. Instead, our campaign (and this tour) is funded by grassroots supporters like you.**
[**So I have to ask: Will you chip in $3.29 — the average cost of a gallon of gas in North Carolina — to our 100 Counties Gas Fund for our van’s next tank of gas?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5665?refcode=em20210719-268&t=1&akid=268%2E3698%2ElebFnF)
**[Contribute $3.29](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5665?refcode=em20210719-268&t=20&akid=268%2E3698%2ElebFnF)**
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5666?refcode=em20210719-268&t=21&akid=268%2E3698%2ElebFnF)
At the heart of our _100 Counties, 100 Day Tour_ is the belief that everyone is worthy of being seen, fought for, and represented.
From our mountains to our coastal communities, to our big cities and small rural towns, we are going everywhere, meeting voters where they are, and leaving no one behind — but I’m counting on your support to help us do it.
[**So if you’re able, will you chip in $3.29 to our 100 Counties Gas Fund to help me connect with voters in every single county in North Carolina?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5665?refcode=em20210719-268&t=22&akid=268%2E3698%2ElebFnF)
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5666?refcode=em20210719-268&t=23&akid=268%2E3698%2ElebFnF)
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210719-268-footer&t=24&refcode2=268_3698_lebFnF&akid=268%2E3698%2ElebFnF)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
clean_body: When I say our grassroots campaign is fueled by you, I mean it literally! When I say you fuel our grassroots campaign, I mean it literally! Last month, we launched our 100 Counties, 100 Day Tour — our campaign’s first-ever statewide tour, and a critical opportunity to connect with North Carolina voters in every single county. And since then, we’ve had conversations with hundreds of voters in 35 counties! But here’s the truth: Visiting all 100 North Carolina counties in 100 days requires an ambitious schedule, a lot of faith, and a ton of resources. I don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, lobbyists, or fossil fuel companies. Instead, our campaign (and this tour) is funded by grassroots supporters like you. At the heart of our 100 Counties, 100 Day Tour is the belief that everyone is worthy of being seen, fought for, and represented. From our mountains to our coastal communities, to our big cities and small rural towns, we are going everywhere, meeting voters where they are, and leaving no one behind — but I’m counting on your support to help us do it. Thank you from the bottom of my heart, Erica Erica Smith for U.S. Senate Email us: mailto: info@ericaforus.com

name: John Castorani
subject: Hillary Clinton Lied. An Ambassador Died
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Congress
body:
For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=256fb408deba48a8a7fa3a888722a1ab&_t=igszm4DzEjFtiS2KKljXAk9J_b4d9iKiVcdrEx7puoCE84aCOk3oRFG8K2RiXtcraPapeN7FeVYg01s1-DgU-5Iy50P5H0_OggSTOWPGimla5lOnAeCF_89smU-XGYLGd-omWxYIvLiT1cOZ7IArWd7jRYJABv63cwb6Ys3SfG8%3D) | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=256fb408deba48a8a7fa3a888722a1ab&_e=GqnF4QsQPI6c4RVZ8E3rjtkjd7aGTudaYXstCKmhlu8tcz9xXH_Fe8U6mbhAwuLS3XMP4E-0gJzbhTvRbxE5lxQK7FAH-1PPmfTsV4jIs5Wna-pNtmRTANp1G3ZKQ53Dns86lYHvDd5MIHWwOtuP-dNyyVLeueUzRzaEPqsWiaLZdd15dcW5LvCfiwQX0ftbpho9otICoucrNRZ3ExASa2H3OxD3fYSblaBTeMCX5AcCc8nojYKXaWqqldAnsXG0jyKkFHjQOQdtIBGF9GWISqpRTNa7V7yO6DDzx3r1CSU4vgecq1ZW2sj2wT_4cpEFlUEaW2g26qMmNJ0CmRbF3r5aNoRW9awiN3cOlU7BULS647Bh4yfeIMqCB38rPyzJryp9DvoqUAnMZmzl1jAfXBoAhs3miovp6BAoVDQM2U7P6RJGKhIa-x-QlFsTThip43pC9Ja3IfpsSAONyAY75fU70OYi51qcfS6ETd7xfQs%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox **I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today.**

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.**I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=256fb408deba48a8a7fa3a888722a1ab&_e=GqnF4QsQPI6c4RVZ8E3rjtkjd7aGTudaYXstCKmhlu8tcz9xXH_Fe8U6mbhAwuLS3XMP4E-0gJzbhTvRbxE5lxQK7FAH-1PPmfTsV4jIs5Wna-pNtmRTANp1G3ZKQ53Dns86lYHvDd5MIHWwOtuP-dNyyVLeueUzRzaEPqsWiaLZdd15dcW5LvCfiwQX0ftbpho9otICoucrNRZ3ExASa2H3OxD3fYSblaBTeMCX5AcCc8nojYKXaWqqldAnsXG0jyKkFHjQOQdtIBGF9GWISjqXqhgXT-pUIVcKlNLTJMmpfdgR6lI9_eVK8TykhGzw5N88hRm0Nh9wp4YOcp6arwtCLQZlDhRY3zfN9LDU6d5PrTLYrQkxwen_vSCwrMl3zDrwXI74Acwn9Uc4sPPLFnLAnuXbv8MFWSRYhqaveOdy0Wf2P-d8sSaQuMsibNUgkRvFZxoSBminNOS1JWLkQqVbOh2iQ8FaeIHwMQMzbcQ%3D)

Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency **[I gave up my career in the intelligence service- along with my security clearance - to run for Congress](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=256fb408deba48a8a7fa3a888722a1ab&_e=GqnF4QsQPI6c4RVZ8E3rjtkjd7aGTudaYXstCKmhlu8tcz9xXH_Fe8U6mbhAwuLS3XMP4E-0gJzbhTvRbxE5lxQK7FAH-1PPmfTsV4jIs5Wna-pNtmRTANp1G3ZKQ53Dns86lYHvDd5MIHWwOtuP-dNyyVLeueUzRzaEPqsWiaLZdd15dcW5LvCfiwQX0ftbpho9otICoucrNRZ3ExASa2H3OxD3fYSblaBTeMCX5AcCc8nojYKXaWqqldAnsXG0jyKkFHjQOQdtIBGF9GWIStAAJg8PDYr-7XLINcxiQ_mhSjHv2hZoASm0sy0-fYAVz2VgvaXJlZuap1-HRlfc9PVVOVda5FqlgNwHfOppJu03p8WZ6Voi1MVqxnNLBsKknvX4Pu9Tjv8EYwrIw0uRw26exFnqo-ogbFoDSNiSEXUtumv53WQULcgul7BpESoRfXbTsx4HWda3BDMd7q0JtSsUTdjxu0-WJtpuCihxXzc%3D)**. I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price.

If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.**As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable** , and in a moment, [**I’m going to humbly ask for your financial assistance regarding my campaign.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=256fb408deba48a8a7fa3a888722a1ab&_e=GqnF4QsQPI6c4RVZ8E3rjtkjd7aGTudaYXstCKmhlu8tcz9xXH_Fe8U6mbhAwuLS3XMP4E-0gJzbhTvRbxE5lxQK7FAH-1PPmfTsV4jIs5Wna-pNtmRTANp1G3ZKQ53Dns86lYHvDd5MIHWwOtuP-dNyyVLeueUzRzaEPqsWiaLZdd15dcW5LvCfiwQX0ftbpho9otICoucrNRZ3ExASa2H3OxD3fYSblaBTeMCX5AcCc8nojYKXaWqqldAnsXG0jyKkFHjQOQdtIBGF9GWIShPo_NYIOrH43qHPwNhO0EriMS-8J8w2gv6Ii3PlWPvSgrrq0Eez7Ysd1aI2zXJi4113lD775IPkog2F6XRnnoectxhFChYDz76D_iZ4A-OLJ_h3ktXNNW8ZF5LiKM-iPr261EixDA6v3ZJMCA2ZYdSkuaUqGrXXYbXYqtlHnAiuW3RpH7EaQUMOna7Oycl1Iu9hHHDHMP-maRtmGMw7Bok%3D)

You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, _**who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades**_ - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel.

**This political assassination made my blood boil**. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. _**We have to fight for it**_.

| [**HELP ME FIGHT FOR _YOU_
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=256fb408deba48a8a7fa3a888722a1ab&_e=GqnF4QsQPI6c4RVZ8E3rjtkjd7aGTudaYXstCKmhlu8tcz9xXH_Fe8U6mbhAwuLS3XMP4E-0gJzbhTvRbxE5lxQK7FAH-1PPmfTsV4jIs5Wna-pNtmRTANp1G3ZKQ53Dns86lYHvDd5MIHWwOtuP-dNyyVLeueUzRzaEPqsWiaLZdd15dcW5LvCfiwQX0ftbpho9otICoucrNRZ3ExASa2H3OxD3fYSblaBTeMCX5AcCc8nojYKXaWqqldAnsXG0jyKkFHjQOQdtIBGF9GWISqw5UVKq82eM0IKtcXDq6VHTs-eBJhFQfydGZODTd-o_Cs96zztKr5_1wfn1xB9lQBUzcAZTBLx3MaCUNNZdPhrQBfw1LEXatkUJe7LSDDeOEmVKB12tryPXKGBMCt2Qb0ukTBgdoHcWCXjtRE1YHw3IZ6lKYj75qwcX_eY1QRouv-p4ACwZYPsQCoQr4K7DisaZA7W0U4fucxAptVAxyvs%3D)
---

Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason **[I’m running for Congress, and today I’m asking if you’ll chip-in $5 or $10 to help me get my campaign off the ground.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=256fb408deba48a8a7fa3a888722a1ab&_e=GqnF4QsQPI6c4RVZ8E3rjtkjd7aGTudaYXstCKmhlu8tcz9xXH_Fe8U6mbhAwuLS3XMP4E-0gJzbhTvRbxE5lxQK7FAH-1PPmfTsV4jIs5Wna-pNtmRTANp1G3ZKQ53Dns86lYHvDd5MIHWwOtuP-dNyyVLeueUzRzaEPqsWiaLZdd15dcW5LvCfiwQX0ftbpho9otICoucrNRZ3ExASa2H3OxD3fYSblaBTeMCX5AcCc8nojYKXaWqqldAnsXG0jyKkFHjQOQdtIBGF9GWISutPpCagNwso-6ARhO0Fj7XiiBjBLln7lmNuVkuKAchzoM_OWYZnXbRpmUIbuXNeaQCHOx8zmv7LfgAiVyL-r5KOBHDglmRX6IO3Se5nT6AmR7I44E4nnJi5CxQ0jAxz8wkYol4rATbVQ1D_m_4RvRRNyCwIqz7TzM0yqixqzbzxguEQrLnKDwHxOniLBYvDSenWeXqbSUiLvRC1ZnOj3co%3D) **

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=256fb408deba48a8a7fa3a888722a1ab&_e=GqnF4QsQPI6c4RVZ8E3rjtkjd7aGTudaYXstCKmhlu8tcz9xXH_Fe8U6mbhAwuLS3XMP4E-0gJzbhTvRbxE5lxQK7FAH-1PPmfTsV4jIs5Wna-pNtmRTANp1G3ZKQ53Dns86lYHvDd5MIHWwOtuP-dNyyVLeueUzRzaEPqsWiaLZdd15dcW5LvCfiwQX0ftbpho9otICoucrNRZ3ExASa2H3OxD3fYSblaBTeMCX5AcCc8nojYKXaWqqldAnsXG0jyKkFHjQOQdtIBGF9GWISnGNTWkE1wMR7m6JFem1b87GhpnwuVe8G2ZtyUaPX5GuBv7hQx7AzfC6hbgoPNke50yGcIKPIJ6enHGZlI5fQsydwLamJ7Pjd6urOJpnsc7i_sYzafUDVjaKqk9x5d6516pzHbaAvkdWcXF110k-0RvGha2oDvATHkK4eKaYbYZATUrlRwUuRn3UGOVb-4uWXFzZS3nnU9_1Ikvzkop2glY%3D)
At the time of the Benghazi attacks, **Hillary Clinton** knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She **knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable**. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, **purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack** , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally.

**[Hillary Clinton’s deceptions and lies will forever stand to serve as prime examples of everything that is wrong in Washington. I’m running to hold these bureaucrats accountable and I hope you’ll help put some wind in my sails by donating $5, $10 or even $50 today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=256fb408deba48a8a7fa3a888722a1ab&_e=GqnF4QsQPI6c4RVZ8E3rjtkjd7aGTudaYXstCKmhlu8tcz9xXH_Fe8U6mbhAwuLS3XMP4E-0gJzbhTvRbxE5lxQK7FAH-1PPmfTsV4jIs5Wna-pNtmRTANp1G3ZKQ53Dns86lYHvDd5MIHWwOtuP-dNyyVLeueUzRzaEPqsWiaLZdd15dcW5LvCfiwQX0ftbpho9otICoucrNRZ3ExASa2H3OxD3fYSblaBTeMCX5AcCc8nojYKXaWqqldAnsXG0jyKkFHjQOQdtIBGF9GWISvPVadnQxHnQET4q3gowCGKFiE0RM87ymteKCeKNLdTWOWqa-5WTPdwcBScEu5q7gt4SHuxYUokswWBlQmnduQWHLwMMUEuHfOeJxNf-NdaryQxDM3qglLdYpWLiJfluyTAxpH3_VeQEYIfwpw1tdmUZoLpSaHZ29ldtFcNX1nx691fuzHuJoHbJoytOwespMC9jmklyFuW43ECUsWmUY-w%3D)**.

[**HELP ME FIGHT FOR _YOU_
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=256fb408deba48a8a7fa3a888722a1ab&_e=GqnF4QsQPI6c4RVZ8E3rjtkjd7aGTudaYXstCKmhlu8tcz9xXH_Fe8U6mbhAwuLS3XMP4E-0gJzbhTvRbxE5lxQK7FAH-1PPmfTsV4jIs5Wna-pNtmRTANp1G3ZKQ53Dns86lYHvDd5MIHWwOtuP-dNyyVLeueUzRzaEPqsWiaLZdd15dcW5LvCfiwQX0ftbpho9otICoucrNRZ3ExASa2H3OxD3fYSblaBTeMCX5AcCc8nojYKXaWqqldAnsXG0jyKkFHjQOQdtIBGF9GWISgMrdwjL1b7nQFMpYzPYvDYHZFPUgKXNSs_56CqjpTesDjs38FiAVYkzair03nqTsXXaagbUhtlz_Box2fpgLQkWp7KJ7-BjBIwHJeIPj7d57FjHfnWgOgCqyO-3g4qJRSQG17KhYxJMMuex7RdBnCdeN89-x6ltbVBtT-e2ylap8PunqRzjJuf848o2J_zrepYcnM0xVLCNTLwkNpeX23k%3D)
---

In service
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

**P.S.** I have no money to invest in this campaign. **What I do have is a lot of pride** , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can,**[chip in $5 or $10 today to help send me to Congress and hold career politicians accountable.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=256fb408deba48a8a7fa3a888722a1ab&_e=GqnF4QsQPI6c4RVZ8E3rjtkjd7aGTudaYXstCKmhlu8tcz9xXH_Fe8U6mbhAwuLS3XMP4E-0gJzbhTvRbxE5lxQK7FAH-1PPmfTsV4jIs5Wna-pNtmRTANp1G3ZKQ53Dns86lYHvDd5MIHWwOtuP-dNyyVLeueUzRzaEPqsWiaLZdd15dcW5LvCfiwQX0ftbpho9otICoucrNRZ3ExASa2H3OxD3fYSblaBTeMCX5AcCc8nojYKXaWqqldAnsXG0jyKkFHjQOQdtIBGF9GWISguveEsoqb9eVTD_xpi9VontYp0pVgY3ttWTku9MoxcI17ZJ0kHSlf-q1ehoLkf4dzrAnqHD8Gg6foLapLl0SP5MNBMbGdKvug3D_cS_UrQt6OCHFxN56gX5lRToidHkoo_a2Q0OiGFkgOMyd6IYFL1o9_CZ_O-UckNTxh9_Yxxf3MF0861jaciq5ORcPFajZ_eBXrXL4hqG_l0s28kgtHQ%3D)**

| Paid for by John Castorani for Congress

What I do have is a lot of pride , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can, | Paid for by John Castorani for Congress

clean_body: A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dism A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022. | Peter, Imagine the progressive Democrats’ worst nightmare: A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022. I am running for Congress in one of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s target districts, Nevada-03, where I am taking on a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of -- other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time. Honestly, this could be the sleeper race that finally forces Nancy Pelosi to put her Washington D.C. penthouse on the market, having lost the House majority for the last time in her career. With three children, I worked to pay my own way through college, and then law school.When I wasn’t packing lunches and sitting in school pick-up lines, I was a practicing attorney, building a business, fighting for the underdog, and taking on tough cases. I am proud to be a working mom. Now I want to take that same drive and attitude to Congress. I’m the type of person who outworks everyone in the room and exceeds expectations. My plan is to take down one of Pelosi’s most trusted partners before she even knows she’s in trouble. My hope is that by the time she finds out, I’ll have such a groundswell of grassroots support that it will simply be too late. Last election, we saw more women elected to Congress than we ever have before -- and 31 of them were Conservative Republicans! We are the antithesis of what progressive Democrats want women to be, and we hold the power to take back the House in the Midterm Election. Thank you, April Becker Republican for Congress (NV-03) P.S. If you’re a proud Republican woman, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. And if you’re a proud Republican man, | April Becker is a true Nevada success story. As a working mom with young children, April put herself through college and law school at UNLV. April is the owner of April Becker & Associates law firm and is a top-rated litigator and real estate attorney in Las Vegas. name: Derek Schmidt
subject: Kansas Needs a Firewall
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
You see it on the national news every single day. The radical left is completely unhinged. Trusted conservative voices are being cancelled and...... Friend, You see it on the national news every single day. The radical left is completely unhinged. Trusted conservative voices are being cancelled and erased from the public sphere. Government bureaucrats are pushing for liberal talking points to become school lesson plans. Plans are being drawn up to keep spending and spending until taxes on families and businesses go through the roof. But that’s not all I’m concerned about... Some extreme Washington politicians are trying to do away with your current healthcare plan and push every American into a government-run Medicare for All-style insurance scheme. They want to implement the Green New Deal, impose burdensome regulations on our farmers and ranchers, and join international climate change agreements that shackle America while leaving China free to build new coal plants at a record-setting pace... while you foot the bill. **Kansas needs a firewall. The Sunflower State needs a leader to stand firm in between our families and businesses, and the radical politicians in Washington trying to dictate how we live our lives. ** As attorney general, I have a long record of standing up against dangerous liberal policies. I even took the Obama-Biden administration to court repeatedly – and won. **As governor, I will fight tooth and nail to protect Kansas from the damage being done by the Socialist Pelosi-Schumer-AOC crowd in Washington.

** **[But I need your help. Will you sign the appeal to STOP THE RADICAL LEFT immediately?](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=9bf6e26ad3d949ab848e09fa272c4183&_e=uZ6lW-o9E2P0erCMoFwB4Ca44fIQMN6X8f-wF-EtDZ7KtmhwxNHqmgzqV5-R-mVw3t5ALnilYnixxa98Sqz4m_K78ruSAD8FiIm6a5DKgZaCRvwxEwNWDmHjp1h61iA5JXbxtQu5Ho8jrbyYKy6jMyABsUqCUSPYkMQ4X6oMjhHIrvsukNbrnLcXVinzyFf2tHvHGTCjCdor0YJjNV6k4ZqN1KcAlLA62mWOm8rWQr4BwUrIrXmeMrPtPT8anR2PWIvIyt453t8NzFINt7GDZGaSq8LQKrM2tnj2xkakjugrTnvxVAWKioMLMMpousMuLANjJme1LK8Op5LN73lIUdN3_B9VbYYJG5a7Utj-IzAjqOhi_zqbx7jaZHSlqy9SjV9_EAGdm1thGX-bMurYFkVI-FXdGPvIYRvnVGn4V164jS6zgnb5GH21WfGdxKQ5) ** [**I’m fully committed to acting as the firewall between Pelosi’s Washington and your Kansas. | | Friend,

My opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has spent thousands hiring political polling firms to tell her what she should say and think to win the election.

But I don’t care what the fake polls tell me, I only care about what you think Friend.

That is why every month I will continue to ask you what issues matter most and listen to what is bothering you, not some special interest groups.

When I become a Congresswoman, I am working for YOU - not the other way around.

[**So please take a moment and tell me what issues matter most to you. >>**](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=3829841ca6&e=ae0ea222da)

BEFORE MIDNIGHT: DO YOU SUPPORT DREAMERS AND CONDEMN TRUMP'S ANTI-IMMIGRANT REPUBLICANS?
| |
| | **DO YOU SUPPORT DREAMERS?**

We just learned upsetting news:__**_A federal judge just ruled that DACA is unlawful. _**

And with Trump's Republicans working overtime to annihilate this crucial program, it's up to us to protect our DREAMers.
**
So we need to know: Do you SUPPORT our DREAMers and CONDEMN Trump 's anti-immigrant Republicans?**
---
[YES ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/-YK-)
---|---|---

We're outraged.

_**A federal judge just ruled that DACA is unlawful.**_

This program is essential to protecting undocumented immigrants who came to our country as children.

While he was president, Donald Trump **INSULTED** our DREAMers and even tried to **TERMINATE** their protections.

And even though the Supreme Court upheld DACA last year, that hasn't stopped Trump and his Republicans from working overtime to gut this crucial program at every turn.

It's cruel and it's wrong \-- **[so we must do everything we can to protect our DREAMers, defend DACA, and put an end to the Republicans' attacks on immigrants.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/yr-jf4p_)**

**That 's why we're calling for 5O,OOO grassroots Democrats to take our 3O-second survey and let us know if they SUPPORT our DREAMers and CONDEMN Trump's anti-immigrant Republicans.**
_**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: DO YOU SUPPORT DREAMERS AND CONDEMN TRUMP'S ANTI-IMMIGRANT REPUBLICANS?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/V4_)**_
| [YES ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/-YK-)
---|---|---
****

Thank you,
